**[I don’t want to have to show up to my meeting empty-handed. clean_body: I promised fellow Republican leaders a response from Patriot. And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises. I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them. I look forward to reading your responses, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Humbly asking for your support
body:
Fish, family, freedom and fighting corruption. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582004/595921840/-1353982588?&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=) Peter - My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution with me and Josh Harder today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2026-FR-MaryPeltola](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582005/595921841/-1353982588?&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=)** [CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582006/595921842/-1353982588?&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=) Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._ They're focused on their own wallets — not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. **This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.** So I am asking: [_**Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Josh Harder today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582007/595921843/-1353982588?&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582008/595921844/-1353982588?express_lane=true&&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582009/595921845/-1353982588?express_lane=true&&refcode=E17912-20260118-MaryPeltola-EG-Surrogate&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThmYjdlZDktY2FmNC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcpytxXbyPQuZ9r39G93tcOSzMV8lrZX6gmiaLb6E_c=)**

| | It’s election season in Georgia once again! **Fair Fight is proud to support Democrat LeMario Brown, who’s running in the special election for Georgia Senate District 18. This Tuesday, January 20, is the last day of voting — and it’s our first chance to kick off a critical election year with a win.** [**Will you split a donation between LeMario Brown’s campaign and Fair Fight today? With the special election coming up fast on Tuesday, it’s crunch time to get out the vote, and every contribution helps grow pro-voter political power for the long haul.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582165/595939394/554260061?refcode=emm_ff_20260118_T1_LeMarioBrownSplit_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjhkY2VkMi1jZmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHAany3gs1ZPmTXklXACWCwWkmaxhs16KWfOyBem8Qg=) We identify candidates like LeMario Brown who are committed to defending democracy, and who can make a real impact in the roles they are running for. He is a farmer, small business owner, and experienced local public servant as a former Mayor Pro Tem and former City Councilman. If he wins this election on Tuesday, he’ll fight for Georgia families in the State Senate — working to lower everyday costs, support farmers and small businesses, and make sure local voices are heard. And because chambers like the Georgia Senate are key hotspots in the fight to stop anti-voter legislation, we need to make sure we have as many allies in office as possible. LeMario Brown is running a community-first campaign to reach as many voters on the ground as possible in the remaining days and hours until polls close. **Let’s have his back right now — and let’s get ready to elect more and more pro-voter candidates in the rest of 2026 and beyond.** [**Please split a donation between LeMario Brown for Georgia Senate and Fair Fight today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123582166/595939395/554260061?refcode=emm_ff_20260118_T1_LeMarioBrownSplit_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjhkY2VkMi1jZmY0LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHAany3gs1ZPmTXklXACWCwWkmaxhs16KWfOyBem8Qg=) In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team

$7. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC today. $7 because we can’t let Republicans hold onto their trifecta and hand Trump two more years to enact his authoritarian agenda with unchecked power. $7 because the _only_ way Democrats will win back Congress is if we can reach and register as many voters as possible ahead of the midterms. **$7 because the DNC is doing exactly that.** We’ve just launched “When We Count,” a first-of-its-kind partisan voter registration initiative to register hundreds of thousands of new Democratic voters in key battleground congressional districts. Derek, this work is made possible by grassroots contributions in response to emails like this one. ### Exploring relative threats to the Arctic island nation.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Jan 19
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bafdc49b-71e2-4d36-ad55-b8b2f8751d34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I recently [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ed5e-c540-48b0-b0f5-bcfefe0b8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Canada's military preparing for a possible war with the United States. I suggested we might make sense of the seemingly shocking headline as an effort for global elites in Canada to bolster support for their diversification agenda.
* * *
## [Don't Diversify...Deepen!](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ed5e-c540-48b0-b0f5-bcfefe0b8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 11
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ed5e-c540-48b0-b0f5-bcfefe0b8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The key to navigating today's uncertainty, I've argued, is to form a mosaic from the cross-current of the forces buffeting our world. Leaders need to focus on connecting dots across seemingly disparate domains. Siloed thinking around a single discipline (economics, for instance) is a sure-fire way to misinterpret today's chaos and experts who fail to broaden their thinking will struggle to lead effectively as they gain greater responsibility.](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ed5e-c540-48b0-b0f5-bcfefe0b8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ed5e-c540-48b0-b0f5-bcfefe0b8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Efforts such as these are fundamentally oriented towards maintaining the status quo...a status quo which...drumroll please...keeps them in charge. Worse than keeping them in charge, many of the policies they promote hurt the very people they claim to represent. They implement policies that they themselves refuse to follow in a quest to stay in charge. As a case in point, consider Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney's climate agenda. Why shouldn't Canada develop its amazing endowment of hydrocarbon resources? Doing so would increase growth, generate jobs, and lower inflation--a genuine benefit to most Canadians. It could also make the world safer as it lowers the much-needed oil revenues for Putin and the Iranian regime.
* * *
## [Drill, Baby, Drill!](https://substack.com/redirect/12353797-10f7-4156-bbfd-aa577e19222a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| October 16, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/12353797-10f7-4156-bbfd-aa577e19222a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The world is fragile, something we all feel as wars rage, inflation persists, economies slow, and the climate changes. Unlocking America's vast energy potential and aggressively developing our hydrocarbon resources is one strategy that could reduce geopolitical tensions, lower inflation, and yes, believe it or not, help save the environment.](https://substack.com/redirect/12353797-10f7-4156-bbfd-aa577e19222a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/12353797-10f7-4156-bbfd-aa577e19222a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Carney's [recent trip](https://substack.com/redirect/82514231-6763-4314-8fe6-bf953f697b9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to China captures this hypocrisy perfectly. Almost all Canadians know the United States is not a military threat. Almost all Canadians know that China is growing their carbon emissions faster than anyone else. And almost all Canadians know that the Middle Kingdom regularly uses coercive, violent means to control their own people. Yet Carney is trying to diversify away from America towards China? To put Canada first, Carney should deepen, not diversify, the country's relationship with the United States. Focusing on the supposed threat from the United States is distracting and deflects attention from the real threat.
[| | | | | Skscartoon
---
@skscartoon
Canada will never be America's 51st state, because they're already China's 24th Province.
| | | | | Bloomberg @business
---|---|---
Canada's PM Mark Carney praised a renewed partnership with China's Xi Jinping during a four-day visit to China: https://t.co/Twy6ZepwlC
| 6:06 AM * Jan 16, 2026 * 1.59M Views600 Replies * 2.12K Reposts * 14.5K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c797972c-f272-4e8b-870d-b76290972279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The global grandstanding for the benefit of elites and the status quo was on full display again this week in Greenland. In response to U.S. President Donald Trump's growing focus on Greenland, Denmark [increased its military presence](https://substack.com/redirect/9eb9cf78-c9b9-4412-be28-a4bf359a387f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the semiautonomous island, so as to defend it from...a U.S. invasion. This is kabuki theater at its finest.
Desperate to appear relevant, other European nations quickly announced that they, too, [would send reinforcements](https://substack.com/redirect/c41d9013-eca4-4604-a89e-936b58e9fa0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's nice to see the European members of NATO finally take military action, I suppose. But you don't have to go too deep into these news articles to find out exactly how unserious these deployments are, however. [France sent 15 personnel; Germany sent 13; Sweden sent 3; Norway sent two; and Britain sent...one](https://substack.com/redirect/ac325f46-eeb1-4a0b-b240-52e0601d4cf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And they are not going to be there for very long either; it is only going to be a quick two-day mission. Not exactly the [Normandy Landings](https://substack.com/redirect/2a78ea85-8075-4a43-8e49-bae8c0b6b573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)... By the time you read this, the European defense of Greenland may be over.
* * *
## [Greenbacks for Greenland?](https://substack.com/redirect/b8464247-2d42-46f9-85d4-d413d6df142f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| February 19, 2025
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b8464247-2d42-46f9-85d4-d413d6df142f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Even before he was sworn in to his second term, President Donald Trump's public musings about acquiring Greenland -- by purchase or by force -- left ordinary Americans and elites alike puzzled by the seemingly erratic attention being paid to the Arctic island.](https://substack.com/redirect/b8464247-2d42-46f9-85d4-d413d6df142f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/b8464247-2d42-46f9-85d4-d413d6df142f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Greenland occupies an increasingly strategic geography on the planet, and Europe is right to suggest it needs defending. But the main threat, it may shock you, is not America. Could empty European posturing against a faux military threat (with a handful of symbolic deployments) be an attempt for the Danes to gain headlines ahead of [this week's gatherings in Davos](https://substack.com/redirect/2c78bd15-75fb-42fc-9aa2-32a102244a0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? After all, while beating their chests against America, Europe remains feckless in the face of Chinese and Russian aggression. Just as with Canada, focusing on the supposed threat from America misses the real threat.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LRrXmVWlapOSk_4Oe5rlroP11W4gENKmmksERDgP6C8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184961215)
Back in his real estate days, Trump always started negotiations by threatening to sue everyone. This is nothing more than initial positioning with which to leverage a deal. As I've often said, leaders around the world should take him seriously, but not literally. Taking him literally, but not seriously, is a recipe for misinterpretation and confusion. Trump should be taken as deadly serious when he highlights the strategic importance of the Arctic and the threat of Russia and China in that domain. As noted by [Michael Kao](https://open.substack.com/users/33266359-michael-kao?utm_source=mentions), let's not confuse Trump's methods with the significance of the issues.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f819fad-be99-44bc-99b5-ae731641cdd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Post from Michael Kay (@urbankaoboy)
Rather than empty rhetoric and symbolic gestures, Europeans should increase their defense spending and meet their NATO obligations. They should beef up their militaries and get serious about defending the European Arctic, as this area will surely be a crucial battlefield of the 21st century. And they need to stop the status quo, elite-driven, blatant hypocrisy. Don't forget that despite their kicking and screaming about the Russo-Ukrainian War, [they have given more money to Russia in the form of energy revenue than they have given to the Ukrainians in aid](https://substack.com/redirect/2f63f03f-e0e5-4684-a850-af851d7025ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
## [Time to Pick](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb073a-3ec6-4b5f-b5a3-5ea7b8c31749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| October 26, 2025
[](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb073a-3ec6-4b5f-b5a3-5ea7b8c31749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I've recently been on the road a lot and have had meetings in Tennessee, South Dakota, Arkansas, and Washington DC. I also made a quick trip to Barranquilla, Colombia to give a keynote speech on navigating global uncertainty, and while in Washington, was on a panel discussing the US economy and how consumer behavior might change in the future.](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb073a-3ec6-4b5f-b5a3-5ea7b8c31749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/26eb073a-3ec6-4b5f-b5a3-5ea7b8c31749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Finally, Greenland, Denmark, and the rest of Europe (as well as Canada) have to wake up to the true threats to their national security and risks in the Arctic. It's easy to poke the American eagle in the eye because they know Uncle Sam won't poke back; yet they'd never dare prod the Chinese Dragon or its comrade the Russian Bear because they know there will be repercussions.
The world is rapidly bifurcating into two political and economic ecosystems - one led by the United States and the other led by the Chinese. Sooner or later, everyone is going to have to pick a side.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..LRrXmVWlapOSk_4Oe5rlroP11W4gENKmmksERDgP6C8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184961215)

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/83de6090-44fe-416f-bba5-8f362e8d7ca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/04337665-c4b6-4114-9f4a-5a1c4320aa15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/9f5923cf-0522-4c74-b599-8afcd2aca3a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/12f643b6-04c4-42ca-a022-ffcf02a8be62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). clean_body: Exploring relative threats to the Arctic island nation. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Exploring relative threats to the Arctic island nation. | | | Jan 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I recently about Canada's military preparing for a possible war with the United States. I suggested we might make sense of the seemingly shocking headline as an effort for global elites in Canada to bolster support for their diversification agenda. | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 11 | Efforts such as these are fundamentally oriented towards maintaining the status quo...a status quo which...drumroll please...keeps them in charge. Worse than keeping them in charge, many of the policies they promote hurt the very people they claim to represent. They implement policies that they themselves refuse to follow in a quest to stay in charge. As a case in point, consider Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney's climate agenda. Why shouldn't Canada develop its amazing endowment of hydrocarbon resources? Doing so would increase growth, generate jobs, and lower inflation--a genuine benefit to most Canadians. It could also make the world safer as it lowers the much-needed oil revenues for Putin and the Iranian regime. | | | | ---|---|--- | October 16, 2023 | Carney's to China captures this hypocrisy perfectly. Almost all Canadians know the United States is not a military threat. Almost all Canadians know that China is growing their carbon emissions faster than anyone else. And almost all Canadians know that the Middle Kingdom regularly uses coercive, violent means to control their own people. Yet Carney is trying to diversify away from America towards China? To put Canada first, Carney should deepen, not diversify, the country's relationship with the United States. Focusing on the supposed threat from the United States is distracting and deflects attention from the real threat. The global grandstanding for the benefit of elites and the status quo was on full display again this week in Greenland. In response to U.S. President Donald Trump's growing focus on Greenland, Denmark on the semiautonomous island, so as to defend it from...a U.S. invasion. This is kabuki theater at its finest. Desperate to appear relevant, other European nations quickly announced that they, too, . It's nice to see the European members of NATO finally take military action, I suppose. But you don't have to go too deep into these news articles to find out exactly how unserious these deployments are, however. . And they are not going to be there for very long either; it is only going to be a quick two-day mission. Not exactly the ... By the time you read this, the European defense of Greenland may be over. | | | | ---|---|--- | February 19, 2025 | Greenland occupies an increasingly strategic geography on the planet, and Europe is right to suggest it needs defending. But the main threat, it may shock you, is not America. Could empty European posturing against a faux military threat (with a handful of symbolic deployments) be an attempt for the Danes to gain headlines ahead of ? After all, while beating their chests against America, Europe remains feckless in the face of Chinese and Russian aggression. Just as with Canada, focusing on the supposed threat from America misses the real threat. Back in his real estate days, Trump always started negotiations by threatening to sue everyone. This is nothing more than initial positioning with which to leverage a deal. As I've often said, leaders around the world should take him seriously, but not literally. Taking him literally, but not seriously, is a recipe for misinterpretation and confusion. Trump should be taken as deadly serious when he highlights the strategic importance of the Arctic and the threat of Russia and China in that domain. As noted by , let's not confuse Trump's methods with the significance of the issues. | | ---|---|--- Post from Michael Kay (@urbankaoboy) Rather than empty rhetoric and symbolic gestures, Europeans should increase their defense spending and meet their NATO obligations. They should beef up their militaries and get serious about defending the European Arctic, as this area will surely be a crucial battlefield of the 21st century. And they need to stop the status quo, elite-driven, blatant hypocrisy. Don't forget that despite their kicking and screaming about the Russo-Ukrainian War, . | | | | ---|---|--- | October 26, 2025 | Finally, Greenland, Denmark, and the rest of Europe (as well as Canada) have to wake up to the true threats to their national security and risks in the Arctic. It's easy to poke the American eagle in the eye because they know Uncle Sam won't poke back; yet they'd never dare prod the Chinese Dragon or its comrade the Russian Bear because they know there will be repercussions. The world is rapidly bifurcating into two political and economic ecosystems - one led by the United States and the other led by the Chinese. Sooner or later, everyone is going to have to pick a side. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: [VAP] Voter Registration Team
subject: Here's the deal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Here's the deal, team: Voter registration work happens all year long, not just in the summer and through the lead-in to the deadlines ahead of Election Day.
There's no better way to defend our fundamental right to vote than by registering a ton of new voters and winning critical local, state, and federal elections. Our access to the ballot -- from vote-by-mail to drop boxes to early voting and more -- depends on being able to pass laws that are pro-voter, not pro-incumbent politician.
As little as $3 supports our work to register a new voter. Please, RUSH $30 or more right now to help us register 10 new voters to fight back at the polls >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=011826_3&amount=30]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
MS NOW: ‘The largest investment ever’: DNC launches voter registration drive [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=011826_3&amount=30]
The 2025 elections showed us a valuable truth, folks: Voter participation is increasing in all the right ways.
Voter registration activity increased across the country. According to the team at National Voter Registration Day, New York recorded more registrations for their 2025 events than in 2024, and California saw similar increases. Earlier this fall it looked like voter participation was going to make a real jump, even in a so-called "off-year".
Then Election Day came. New Jersey had more voters turn out for a gubernatorial election than they had in 20 years. Crucial counties in Pennsylvania saw their highest turnout levels in almost 15 years. New York City reached a turnout percentage unseen in over five decades.
We can drive even higher levels of participation when voters understand the stakes and feel like their vote matters , just like it did last November. That's why our voter registration efforts are so important, and why we work on it all year long.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $30 or more today to help register 10 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=011826_3&amount=30]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=011826_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=011826_3&amount=36]
The key is getting young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights across the country -- to see the importance of voting now more than ever. Pundits in Virginia said they could have called the election results when they saw the first turnout numbers from the major college campus locations around the state. That's the kind of impact these young voters can have.
Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The upcoming midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at a cost to us of just about $3 per new voter -- can be game-changing. Can you pitch in with $30 or however much you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters ahead of this year's voter registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=011826_3&amount=30]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011826_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=zv4WQp6j5n3IbMmyiBw8y5lw1yTT83xv6Rs5dJBzTGJcwFQhzNn8ZQEZ3Difsof%2F4so%2F7rMgFpw8ICsrLwp3ZrtLjlHNCPhiKmqeSw3qtovtkdro56OU4ptBDJFPsu20gs%2BXpJNJyFno37UFv3cSpZ%2FcTt%2BgL8zEGXPo3E5ePbpibDgE9Nf2np6o4BzvhpEM2tXQ%2BvDgY7bQkevEives8A3g1pNlgNlXcR%2BpHJ%2BlRkYS7dAQJVGvntbIcBZjuz8HUmO9Q2vxPAxhLBJDREgeXLZpYeWoQc1cEviVeFJyzSCnqPjjoeAjBMqF%2BGE8pR3S3Olth%2F6u05t4oo5LD0thysrkkFkR49trkY5Y2T4%2F04ci3Q8eHj2X%2FT3ktsRtvW21TXbLp1w0NJpgEZHU8LLDJ0fir8MdFBXQw8MkW35KtsA%3D .

name: SDC HQ
subject: Democrats in must-win races across the country are already getting hammered with attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races. That's why we need your help today.
#
You need to know about this, Peter: **Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting hammered with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and 2026 just started! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99885?refcode=em20260118-9961&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9961%2E614464%2EuufQls)**
**[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99885?refcode=em20260118-9961&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9961%2E614464%2EuufQls)**
We can’t afford to fall behind this early. The simple truth is that if we don’t start organizing and building our war chest now, we could risk letting MAGA Republicans define the narrative and keep their control over the Senate AND the House.
Over the coming weeks + months, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us prepare for the fight ahead. **We need the resources to help Democrats in must-win races introduce themselves to voters while also standing up to the inevitable onslaught of GOP attacks.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99885?refcode=em20260118-9961&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9961%2E614464%2EuufQls)**

**Here’s what we’re fighting for, Peter: **
* A life working people can actually afford.
* A healthcare system that provides universal coverage.
* An economy that provides all workers with a real living wage, dignity on the job, and the right to organize a union.
* A tax system that requires billionaires and big corporations to pay their fair share.
* An end to the corruption that has ruined our faith in Washington.

My MAGA opponent Ryan Mackenzie is actively working against this agenda in Congress. Every day, he’s taking his marching orders from Donald Trump.
Together, they’ve jacked up healthcare premiums, cut Medicaid and SNAP, and given huge tax breaks to the ultra-rich.
[**If you’re as fed up as I am, then please consider matching our $27 average contribution. name: Message from Trump
subject: I'm starting to think something happened to you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
PLEASE, I'm worried about you!
| | | | ****
# **It’s Trump, and you’ve got me WORRIED!**
****

---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[RESPOND TO TRUMP NOW ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Hello Friend, are you there?
I’ve been dialing your number for DAYS now, and I’m starting to think something’s wrong! Or maybe my calls aren’t getting through.

[RESPOND TO TRUMP NOW ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I really hope you haven’t abandoned me, and the MAGA Movement, especially at a time like this.
Democrats just announced articles of impeachment against Pete Hegseth. I’m serious! It’s all over the news.
They’re plotting to undermine the MAGA movement by trying to IMPEACH one of the key fighters keeping our country strong!
**This is a direct attack on everything we’ve built, and we can’t let them weaken us now.**

[FIGHT BACK](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
****Friend, your name is at the top of my list of loyal MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you in this critical fight.
Please don’t abandon MAGA when we need you most. Could you take just 30 seconds to reaffirm your support and answer a few quick questions for me?

[RESPOND TO TRUMP NOW ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**_[I know you’re busy, but your input has always mattered to me, now more than ever as we gear up to steamroll the Radical Left in these coming midterms!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Thank you for standing strong,
President Donald J. Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[RESPOND TO TRUMP NOW ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Team - in a moment, we're going to ask you to chip in $10 ahead of the 16-year anniversary to help pass a Constitutional Amendment to overturn Citizens United. THREE: Republicans are hoping you'll ignore this so they can keep rigging the system and buying elections. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

clean_body: New information shows how power could be locked in indefinitely. | | | Friend, The country is falling apart. I can’t believe this is happening right now. The full, unedited proof has dropped, confirming the Democrats' plan to take the most important Senate seat — Mike Rogers' race in Michigan — and take control of the Senate forever. I’m sharing the devastating findings of my emergency briefing with you because your counsel is critical. We must prevent the Democrats from going any further. Sincerely, – Senator Thune | | Text JOIN to 22033 | |

name: Scott Wiener
subject: Let’s talk honestly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |

Peter,

**I know who I work for - and why we fight.**

I fight for the public transit and affordable housing we’re building - so that working families, young people, and long-time residents can actually live in San Francisco.

I fight to unmask the secret police Donald Trump is using to intimidate immigrant communities - so that no one has to fear being kidnapped from the streets.

I fight to cap insulin costs and take on corporate healthcare - so that people with chronic illnesses, especially our low-income and uninsured neighbors, can afford the medicine they need to survive.

I fight for the No Kings Act - which just this past week took a huge step forward - so that everyday people, not political insiders or wealthy donors, have a real say in what happens in their communities.

**This work __matters__. None of what we’ve accomplished was easy - but I’ve never walked away and I won’t start now.

_[But Peter, I have an important question: What matters most to you right now?](mailto:email@scottwiener.com)_**

It’s easy to get pulled into every flashpoint, every headline, every viral clip. I hear from the loud voices often - but I can’t let our movement be defined by them. _**[We are defined by our shared purpose, so please tell me what’s on your mind.](mailto:email@scottwiener.com)**_

No issue is off the table _(just don’t be gross or weird)_.
Public safety. Housing. Venezuela. Minnesota. San Francisco. What you’re worried about. What you’re hopeful about. Whatever you want to talk about.**_[Just reply to this email if you have something to say - I’m listening.](mailto:email@scottwiener.com)_**

Scott

clean_body: | | Peter, I know who I work for - and why we fight. I fight for the public transit and affordable housing we’re building - so that working families, young people, and long-time residents can actually live in San Francisco. I fight to unmask the secret police Donald Trump is using to intimidate immigrant communities - so that no one has to fear being kidnapped from the streets. I fight to cap insulin costs and take on corporate healthcare - so that people with chronic illnesses, especially our low-income and uninsured neighbors, can afford the medicine they need to survive. I fight for the No Kings Act - which just this past week took a huge step forward - so that everyday people, not political insiders or wealthy donors, have a real say in what happens in their communities. This work matters. None of what we’ve accomplished was easy - but I’ve never walked away and I won’t start now. mailto:email@scottwiener.com It’s easy to get pulled into every flashpoint, every headline, every viral clip. I hear from the loud voices often - but I can’t let our movement be defined by them. mailto:email@scottwiener.com No issue is off the table (just don’t be gross or weird). Public safety. Housing. Venezuela. Minnesota. San Francisco. What you’re worried about. What you’re hopeful about. Whatever you want to talk about.mailto:email@scottwiener.com Scott | | | Scott Wiener is running for Congress to fight for San Francisco** \- to defend our democracy, build affordable housing, expand healthcare, tackle the climate crisis, and make government work for people again. Join our campaign to help deliver bold, practical progress for California and the country. You can learn more about Scott Wiener on his , make a =, or sign up to . name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Test Your Knowledge of the Document That Safeguards Our Liberty
body:
Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjsqi1iko1osorscthapiq6co3sn8rn8l52kdoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s3h68pj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I wonder if you agree with me:

Far too many young people do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution!

At Hillsdale College, every undergraduate student must pass a course on the U.S. Constitution before graduating.

That's rare today. In fact, most colleges and universities don't have this essential course.

The class is also life-changing for many of our young students.

Recently, a student told her professor she "loved this class" because she had **never been taught the Constitution in high school.**

This young lady was well-educated in high school, accomplished, and smart. Yet she had never learned about the Constitution--one of our most important founding documents!

Sadly, this happens more often than you think.

And it is one reason why misunderstandings about the Constitution, and the liberty that it safeguards, are widespread in our country.

To help Americans of all ages learn what the Constitution actually says, Hillsdale College created the National Quiz on the U.S. Constitution. Maybe you'd like to test your constitutional knowledge?

**If so, here 's a secure link for you:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/constitution-quiz**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ci9cinajg81h9oij7otkuuijn5tujpke4c66gg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s3h68pj1chh2bs)

It's short, enjoyable, and revealing.

And when you're done, you can take our popular **FREE online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,"** taught by the same faculty who teach students on our campus.

We produce these educational resources and offer them at no cost because millions of Americans should understand the principles of liberty that make our country so great and so free.

Do you share that belief?

If you do, I hope you'll also consider including a **tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or even $100 after taking the quiz.**

Your support helps us offer **" Constitution 101"** and other free constitution-defending educational resources to millions--especially young people.

**Take your quiz here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/constitution-quiz**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsiilcf6n6imc86kkqts2qaevqku40i4gf1d34mo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s3h68pj1chh2bs)

Thank you for helping keep the principles of liberty alive for the next generation.

Good luck with your quiz,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** For decades, the Constitution has been misunderstood and misrepresented. clean_body: Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution. This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, I wonder if you agree with me: Far too many young people do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution! At Hillsdale College, every undergraduate student must pass a course on the U.S. Constitution before graduating. That's rare today. In fact, most colleges and universities don't have this essential course. The class is also life-changing for many of our young students. Recently, a student told her professor she "loved this class" because she had never been taught the Constitution in high school. This young lady was well-educated in high school, accomplished, and smart. Yet she had never learned about the Constitution--one of our most important founding documents! Sadly, this happens more often than you think. And it is one reason why misunderstandings about the Constitution, and the liberty that it safeguards, are widespread in our country. To help Americans of all ages learn what the Constitution actually says, Hillsdale College created the National Quiz on the U.S. Constitution. Maybe you'd like to test your constitutional knowledge? If so, here 's a secure link for you: It's short, enjoyable, and revealing. And when you're done, you can take our popular FREE online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," taught by the same faculty who teach students on our campus. We produce these educational resources and offer them at no cost because millions of Americans should understand the principles of liberty that make our country so great and so free. Do you share that belief? If you do, I hope you'll also consider including a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or even $100 after taking the quiz. Your support helps us offer " Constitution 101" and other free constitution-defending educational resources to millions--especially young people. Take your quiz here: Thank you for helping keep the principles of liberty alive for the next generation. Good luck with your quiz, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. For decades, the Constitution has been misunderstood and misrepresented. Finally, some good news for Democrats on the redistricting front.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ovD1Hzn2rvi0F_IEd1wSGuChl5VaGQitfKzgdvH6KoPnqBI2IS12IaEcpodtqpEpB3oKHZRQZLkyMsdwfIaaCv6oQqXWq7su4XlP6ATMZxlPp-muxfKTMT6UYIZtU_cD0ea3wpTeGgXfsLFic5xYSi_V5MHsUa3phkE7Uw8y65t8BqL3F3GKk0l_ecZIvCTWErtORVq9iuTPSVZarKxmZIcdlhn3vDAg&c=fVOv13adFyBGCZ2g1SbEBiCFzt0qswJEKFwkBaGIXKOX3Tq6UNcsuw==&ch=SxeAJMHTOapuprv5JhNcvA5JE_ffZv7ayoEuWp0O6KWVUEzWxPNScg==)
---
Peter,
Finally, some good news for Democrats on the redistricting front.
A federal court just upheld California's new Congressional map as constitutional, locking in up to 5 additional seats for Democrats in the 2026 midterms.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ovD1Hzn2rvi0F_IEd1wSGuChl5VaGQitfKzgdvH6KoPnqBI2IS12IaEcpodtqpEpB3oKHZRQZLkyMsdwfIaaCv6oQqXWq7su4XlP6ATMZxlPp-muxfKTMT6UYIZtU_cD0ea3wpTeGgXfsLFic5xYSi_V5MHsUa3phkE7Uw8y65t8BqL3F3GKk0l_ecZIvCTWErtORVq9iuQjIOqtsan-hDSQ32_8zCHI&c=fVOv13adFyBGCZ2g1SbEBiCFzt0qswJEKFwkBaGIXKOX3Tq6UNcsuw==&ch=SxeAJMHTOapuprv5JhNcvA5JE_ffZv7ayoEuWp0O6KWVUEzWxPNScg==)
---
This is massive.
MAGA has already wiped out 10 Democratic seats in red states. If the California map had been struck down, MAGA would have only needed 3 more seats to guarantee control of the House for decades to come--a feat they would have easily been able to achieve.
Now that California's maps are set in stone, Democrats must continue going on the offense to counter MAGA's all out blitz.
Every seat matters right now for Democrats. The math as it currently stands is not in our favor, but with each state that counters MAGA, the momentum swings back in our direction.
That's why what we are doing at Colorado Draws the Line is essential for the Democratic Party. We are spearheading a ballot initiative that would give Democrats 3-4 additional seats in Congress.
Colorado refuses to let MAGA lock in one party rule and dismantle our democracy. We are fighting back, and a win here could very well be the difference maker for Democrats.
[So let's keep up the momentum: Will you rush a donation of $25, $15, or whatever is meaningful to you to our ballot measure committee and help us get new maps on the ballot for Colorado and prevent a MAGA takeover?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ovD1Hzn2rvi0F_IEd1wSGuChl5VaGQitfKzgdvH6KoPnqBI2IS12IaEcpodtqpEp1auWoN3LZkmEZd4AFec6ojLsnWB4adN-GScx39ya0rSXCOKfLpAbunwYYpznplfjnoRsGEd2N5rIIVfCfnqBWI8TRQ9z5Du-wM-CziMP7syfdrBMvqcmefT_BSU6wKquiickXfwmI7CH3vSWnFbkcLkaFoBYfXESpCAlnLk0VLU=&c=fVOv13adFyBGCZ2g1SbEBiCFzt0qswJEKFwkBaGIXKOX3Tq6UNcsuw==&ch=SxeAJMHTOapuprv5JhNcvA5JE_ffZv7ayoEuWp0O6KWVUEzWxPNScg==)

# Monday, January 19, 2026

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1953, Lucille Ball gave birth to her son, Desi Arnaz Jr., on the same night the episode aired in which her character on the [_I Love Lucy_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u2zAQBODTUB0F_tj6KVikUffSphSW5Opp7bVokLQE5fSBA9_gtfMBg8H8-Zq_gJi279_wQFeXNG94FMZaMc_4KjVDRA9_U7pDhD0V2CKss1Gmk0pLPc4RiM_50kS3IBq0DTrdd8Ng1DDYZnUmeGNxURo7YwaEcLVKX4OPYRjH3vqG3LtNaT1qrQalW9tbP8JV--DVaPpFXBRGqim3t0RbXXHhM-2Y25AeDbu11mcR9pcwkzDTcRztSqWmfL5dmKmuVGSEU9ImPyLMdIPtBfmUehRm4lcgZpQemGXdpadcV8lUK6PMFO6nzAj8ySMWkrfcZBefBzFT6XpxUd8PIP6_qf7oyN2ZfwEAAP__xu6J4Q) show gave birth to a son, drawing more viewers than any TV episode in history to that point. If it felt unusually cold this morning, Florida’s [iguanas noticed too](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAYAJ8GOw0_ClhQXGO3115pPuVj5Q7BAKvZffrL3itcPclMMl-3-QY--Hj_hB1NdWmOeJWAtWKe8VFqBosLvFL6AQtnKhAtbDOnXLaUtWycLfjwnPvGGofIUTRomJJac6q1aDZjV7mi0pI7kAPtnV4H6axalBTLIAbRePO2UcZGxqimrBNKLCMMbFkXOnLlSE_R-ppy9518rBu68Ewn5m5NexPMVutRiPggfCJ8uq6rO9JRVv_GhE8YT59T3DFWwieX0wtj6-8PiFBaF1L2FgifmmzscfkQfJGK9PS-gw9_hfqvLafhvwEAAP__jXB3sg). A cold snap sent the reptiles falling from trees, a strange but familiar sight when temperatures drop low enough. Officials say most revive once things warm up. Have you ever seen a stunned iguana? Reply to let us know. ## EU Withholds Trade Bazooka Launch
The European Union backed off triggering its "trade bazooka" anti-coercion instrument against President Trump's Greenland tariff threats during an urgent Sunday meeting, prioritizing [diplomacy while holding](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp_GbIdsQ4IZPHRhS9eO6MDn4MZghI-g9Okror5B19Pp_7_v_7r1NwwxLPdPnMmyT_1CR47ETFtPe-YNHQ34k9IDHT5TxsXh1GupryAVqLZ3GOKrrwtnPZGmqiCrmqsxWhpTFZNtR6r9OHqnsLnUqiJZNeQGlEZenPG-CPZMk0q1SkkjVVk11dDiRQ3jIFvdeFFLcoHTVn6nsPBEPr7Sk7ZyTHMR7cS8ZlF9CN0J3R3HUdK-pVPjfBC6m19wXlYSujurhO6kErpTRuiOdphSdBkGHB_w1oU_X8AMgSETPTK4sMY0I4cRcoo7h7TAEXgCngj2DCcQ3DeiJeLiis269QgxhnxtRC3vM4b45uV_jfy0-jcAAP__xQuTAQ) a $108-billion retaliation package in reserve. President Trump threatened 10% tariffs starting Feb. 1 on eight European countries including Denmark, Germany, and France, escalating to 25% by June unless [Greenland is sold](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrSAYhJ9GOwygR7SguI3due0tzS_8KHcRDPwec_bpN272DbaZ5EsmM5P595yf4IOP61_YUZNLc8SrBCTCPONZKIPFBT5T-gALr1QgWthmyWXPuGBinC348J672mqHKLGtUQvVD4Pkw9DWm27dIIzq1YJuWQCAq14o23F4CAsCXe31ncaFGIXgAxdNq9plhIdYzMJHqVzVcbSeUm7-Jx9pQxfe6YW5MWmvg96IjlK1fyo5VXK6rqtxGaJB2d2GSk4YbzlzOrCS00_ZwHYwOUV2QaTC8GQQyTOTMBufIvOxUD53jMRghZvYzQcjyN65wtaMGANEW2dtj8uH4Euvqo6vO_jwvY1-dehLy68AAAD__-FsjIE) to the United States. European Council President António Costa has convened an extraordinary summit scheduled for Thursday as member states prepare retaliatory tariffs of up to [30% on U.S.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUD2StCAQPY1mWICKEBB8yWTzpRtaLbTKDoLVMmPNnn7LDfYCm3X1e_X-Pu7jHUIMafkPG9oy5zHheUQsBWnE51EIPE7wlfMDPLzyAcnDOkouFeOCCTN6CPE9drW3M6LEtkYrBqW15Fq39Wq9Ma7lHHsHRoFGFE4p6VulO-W14nWwlxoXwgjBNRdNO7STgV5MbuJGDnPVcfShZGo-c0hlxTm-8wupcXmro11L2Y-q_VfJWyVv53k2aXJXiwu_Ppmir-RtIcQUIV03PinvyAjBrejZRAiPkBa2Xwas0HPb2S-fFaAwzwcjl0D2ner6mqzfzxBjONRQdXzZIMSfPOVPI76s_A4AAP__X62IBQ) cars, poultry, and other products if Trump follows through on his threats. The EU will decide after the Feb. 1 deadline whether to deploy its anti-coercion tool, which allows Brussels to impose counter-tariffs without requiring unanimous member state approval.
## Gaza Board Offers Seats for $1 Billion
President Trump is requesting $1 billion from countries seeking permanent membership on his new [Gaza Board of Peace](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0rGHv9U1CkcXfTprQGM7ZJMCAY79Xu00fOK6Se0adzzq-v5Qt98HH_iScZ3tIS6bsGYqay0FW5oCOLn5T-oMNXqhgdHgso6KXSUk-LQx_eS9c4sxEBtQ0ZPfTjCGoc2-Yw2rXD063uacF2HVJPWk-dRQVjO9ipb7y5NaX1pLUalX60Q2snfGq7WjXBsIlOkfOcyuN38pEP2sI7vag81nQ2wRzMuYr2h4BZwBzfOVW-TwLmGxYwKy1g1qOA-ary7idgzoWqdxRZcrnOLPPFVWorc_ErScZdpigzlRPj_bTjB2UmXEnahMXJSsi30xTj8rcPwdd-EJ3aT_ThXzL-rzlfBv4GAAD__-eKiQk), the White House confirmed. The board grants temporary three-year memberships at no cost, but nations contributing the billion-dollar threshold within the first year receive [permanent seats overseeing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-O3CAQx_GnwR0rGDb-U1BsFLmIdGmiKKU1wLAmi40F2M7d00fOK1z9kUbz-_5-m94wxLA-f-BCuvo0rXSWSLVSnmgvNaMjgx8pvdDhkQquDucJBLRcSC6HyWGI79O9cdoTAamGtOzavgfR96qZtfXkEY1wnUcjpQcQHRpUQji425aaoK9rQspBStELeVOdMgN-kcYaMUDn2V2QCzXl258U1jqTj-_poHyzaWminmvdClMPBiOD8TzP21LWyxiMtPK9MBivURemHB2DMZSMFPm2l5kKN2hfPK285n3ZeOFbsK_Cfcqc_pLdazioXP7ED-QmYXY8eb4RWmIwYuaPh_xVOvjO1JhscEx9-3oVpbP8pLw1WbvtDDGG0nbsLp4Lhvj_9_qp4IeGfwEAAP__hG6XMQ) Gaza's reconstruction and governance transition. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu objected to the board's composition, stating its formation "was not coordinated with Israel and runs contrary to its policy" after learning Turkey's foreign minister and a Qatari official received appointments. World leaders from the U.K., Hungary, Argentina, Jordan, India, and Egypt have reportedly received invitations, though only Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has confirmed acceptance of the role.
## Indiana, Miami Clash Tonight for Championship
The 2025 college football season [reaches its climax tonight](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdEb2wAIuXKSh27Qp0RgPy2SNjbADIl__tO8XXn2vjo7On-f0RA4cX79xI1uWNEW6cqBS6JjoXy4HenL4P6U3ejxTxuhxnUBBJ5WW2kweOdxTW3m7EAE1FVndd8MAahiaarWmnxV0j3kwiOBpBgfOKzToH4ZcixXbD01pbbRWg9J10zfO4EO72SkD_SJaRZ5LOuq_iWNZaQl3Oumo57RVwa6l7Fk0vwSMAsbrumrKe_yMAsY5hUAvkktKxWEIAsZc0nELGCcBI3sBY9t32rSq-dyXXUYsnCIGOa-47ZxiXnmX-0En0yXfdGfJ0TNGlBvjxtVh_X5xCJy7XrTqtSGHb7fyo6Cnha8AAAD__5S_i5Q) as the Indiana Hoosiers face off against the Miami Hurricanes to determine the NCAA national champion. Indiana’s year has been historic, winning its first Big Ten title since 1967, logging its [first-ever College Football Playoff](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1utDAQAJ8GOtD65wNTuPgaukubEi32ApsYjPDmTpenjy6vkH40I837bbohJz7WN9zJy5Kngx4lkQhdE30VuTDSjN85f2LEey54RNwmDbprQDVqmCJyek62jn4h0mRq8qrvnNPgnKk3T0ZrxBAshKDd0FkbraIAc-cCWFA1-5cNlBqUAgeqNb2ZB_yn5jDDoPulskCRJV_tR-ZDNlrSM9_pakPe6-Q3kbNU5n-lx0qP5cyXlPaJW84voNIjXsIhUan0OPO6UpEmLGfz4KM0fETGA5slZ5kxpQa0BeOGzrSb7Km-fDwfnBKXrq8srDty-u3Kn2bdvf4JAAD__467fko) wins behind its first-ever Heisman winner, quarterback Fernando Mendoza. Head coach Curt Cignetti is now one win away from completing the most improbable championship run in modern college football history. The Miami Hurricanes enter the game as underdogs, but that’s a familiar script for them this postseason. They punched their ticket to the title match with back-to-back upsets over Texas A&M and Ohio State in the first two rounds, thanks to [their powerful defense](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuhDAURVdjOiN_-JjCRRq6SZsSPezH4MQfZHsgk9VHky2kv7o653zclhs47-L9HQLquqUl4lU81op5wUepGSyu8JPSF1g4U4FoYV8EEwNlnPJpseD8c-kaqzdEgbJBzcdBKcGUks2uu55ZJXs7jlOv-MgNm3o5mMEMAGqQ2Dj9emOcT5wzxXgrR7lO0PPVrGwS40Y6htbVlNvP5GLdcfPPdGJuTQqN13utRyHyjYiZiPm6rtaspRwp1_JaEDGb5D3ekW4p1RW8J2J-WRIx47dxFQPGSssFOdDTJY_RIA0OgivU4oaxIDXbQfMjEjE3Wdvjct67MoykY_cAzv-h1H_1O7X4DQAA__9c5YY6). The Hoosiers are favored by 8.5 points in the game, but Miami is playing in front of what’s essentially a home crowd at Miami’s Hard Rock Stadium. Crowd noise could become the difference between a win and a loss.

clean_body: The European Union backed off triggering its "trade bazooka" anti-coercion instrument against President Trump's Greenland tariff threats during an urgent Sunday meeting, prioritizing a $108-billion retaliation package in reserve. | | | | | | Monday, January 19, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1953, Lucille Ball gave birth to her son, Desi Arnaz Jr., on the same night the episode aired in which her character on the show gave birth to a son, drawing more viewers than any TV episode in history to that point. If it felt unusually cold this morning, Florida’s . A cold snap sent the reptiles falling from trees, a strange but familiar sight when temperatures drop low enough. Officials say most revive once things warm up. Have you ever seen a stunned iguana? Reply to let us know. Today’s sponsor, , makes it easy to get matched with a licensed therapist and start flexible online sessions—by phone, video, or chat—. | EU Withholds Trade Bazooka Launch The European Union backed off triggering its "trade bazooka" anti-coercion instrument against President Trump's Greenland tariff threats during an urgent Sunday meeting, prioritizing a $108-billion retaliation package in reserve. President Trump threatened 10% tariffs starting Feb. 1 on eight European countries including Denmark, Germany, and France, escalating to 25% by June unless to the United States. European Council President António Costa has convened an extraordinary summit scheduled for Thursday as member states prepare retaliatory tariffs of up to cars, poultry, and other products if Trump follows through on his threats. The EU will decide after the Feb. 1 deadline whether to deploy its anti-coercion tool, which allows Brussels to impose counter-tariffs without requiring unanimous member state approval. Gaza Board Offers Seats for $1 Billion President Trump is requesting $1 billion from countries seeking permanent membership on his new , the White House confirmed. The board grants temporary three-year memberships at no cost, but nations contributing the billion-dollar threshold within the first year receive Gaza's reconstruction and governance transition. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu objected to the board's composition, stating its formation "was not coordinated with Israel and runs contrary to its policy" after learning Turkey's foreign minister and a Qatari official received appointments. World leaders from the U.K., Hungary, Argentina, Jordan, India, and Egypt have reportedly received invitations, though only Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has confirmed acceptance of the role. Indiana, Miami Clash Tonight for Championship The 2025 college football season as the Indiana Hoosiers face off against the Miami Hurricanes to determine the NCAA national champion. Indiana’s year has been historic, winning its first Big Ten title since 1967, logging its wins behind its first-ever Heisman winner, quarterback Fernando Mendoza. Head coach Curt Cignetti is now one win away from completing the most improbable championship run in modern college football history. The Miami Hurricanes enter the game as underdogs, but that’s a familiar script for them this postseason. They punched their ticket to the title match with back-to-back upsets over Texas A&M and Ohio State in the first two rounds, thanks to . The Hoosiers are favored by 8.5 points in the game, but Miami is playing in front of what’s essentially a home crowd at Miami’s Hard Rock Stadium. Crowd noise could become the difference between a win and a loss. If I had my druthers, every single investor in The Flyover would be a Flyover reader.
