| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/the-united-states-must-acquire-greenland?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

January 19, 2026
The famous German philosopher, Wolfgang von Goethe once observed "The hardest thing to see is what is in front of your eyes."
Exactly. Much of the world is in denial. Russia wants to restore its empire and eventually invade Eastern Europe. China is determined to dominate the entire planet. This is obvious to anyone who has not been brainwashed with an Ivy League education.

Thus if we Americans do not want our grandchildren to live under barbaric tyranny or live at all, we must accept reality.
Yet, Europe and America's feckless ruling class deny reality out of the naive belief that barbarians will make nice if you pander to them and because their hatred of President Trump supersedes their ability to employ deductive reasoning.
The first step is to make Greenland an American territory. This is not a new idea, and the United States already has a miliary presence there. In fact, President Truman tried to [purchase Greenland](https://substack.com/redirect/68630552-f31c-4647-a3e0-16b571b0b986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for $100,000,000 in gold.
Greenland is part of the Kingdom of Denmark. It is the largest island on the planet and is half the size of the continental United States. Originally colonized by the Vikings over one thousand years ago, it once consisted of farmland and was green, thus the name.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22668131-a046-4887-9421-1aae819d8979?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Greenland's capital - Nuuk
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/16c01134-6bf8-45e4-afc9-66dab9aa7ab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Greenland

But Greta Thunberg's distant ancestor convinced Eric the Red to give up his Lear Jet and the process of global cooling began. Unable to support themselves, the Vikings started raiding Europe and even reached North America, causing an American football team to be named after them. Around the same time the Inuits (who were once called Eskimos) migrated to Greenland from Alaska and are the majority of Greenlanders to this day.
In the 1700s, Danish missionaries entered Greenland and eventually, Greenland became a [Danish colony](https://substack.com/redirect/3d569d08-acdb-4f32-99ef-c6784f5d4def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in in 1814. But after World War II, the United Nations asked Denmark to cease calling Greenland a colony and Denmark agreed, giving Greenland two seats in their Parliament. But Denmark embarked on a [forced sterilization ](https://substack.com/redirect/0f359ea3-ac50-4639-bf63-2bc3823b03fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)program of Greenlanders that was extremely unpopular. Thus in 2009, Denmark enacted legislation that enabled Greenland to become independent if they wish. Greenland's future is now in the hands of its 56,000 inhabitants.
Enter President Trump who recklessly suggested taking over Greenland by [military force.](https://substack.com/redirect/3d569d08-acdb-4f32-99ef-c6784f5d4def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Europe quickly reacted saying that such action would mean the end of NATO with Germany, France, Norway, and Sweden sending troops to Greenland to ostensibly counter an American invasion. The people of Greenland overwhelming [screamed a resounding "No](https://substack.com/redirect/3d569d08-acdb-4f32-99ef-c6784f5d4def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" to an American takeover.

But just because President Trump is a wrecking ball doesn't mean that he is wrong. The shortest route of nuclear missiles from Russia to the United States is over Greenland. Shipping lanes surrounding Greenland are routes for Russian and Chinese nuclear submarines to attack us from the Atlantic Ocean. Within the next few decades, laser technology will be capable of destroying hundreds of airborne nuclear missiles from space and from land-based locations in Greenland. President Reagan's dream of rendering nuclear weapons "impotent and obsolete" will be realized.

Plus, Greenland is loaded with untapped oil and rare earth elements crucial for high-tech weapons.
To adequately defend ourselves and Europe, we must have sovereignty over Greenland. While Denmark has allowed us to place military bases in Greenland, we are subject to the vicissitudes of Danish politics, which could change on a dime. Afterall, when the Soviet Union was marching towards global domination before Ronald Reagan's election, President Carter said Americans had "an inordinate fear of Communism" while liberals foolishly advocated for a nuclear freeze movement. Similar events could occur in Denmark at any time.

If President Trump is so adept at "the art of the deal" as he claims, it is time to give Greenlanders an offer they can't refuse - full American citizenship, statehood connected to Maine, a million dollars each, continuance of the popular Danish welfare state and the free training of promising Greenlanders to be doctors and surgeons at American medical schools.

Then say to the Greenlanders, "We respect you. You are masters of your fate. This is a reasonable offer."

And then humbly asking Greenlanders to vote by referendum. But it is crucial that this vote be a supermajority of at least 60%. If only 50.3% of Greenlanders want to join the United States, the chance of acceptance of our hegemony will be much less.

When the Cold War ended, America' ruling class screwed up royally. They expanded NATO too rapidly, humiliating Russia and causing the Putin backlash. They accepted China into the World Trade Organization allowing its economy to boom under the naive assumption that China would adopt democratic values despite millenniums of evidence to the contrary.

Now these same people belittle President Trump for exposing their failures but do not offer any solutions. NATO needs to be updated. Does America's ruling class really believe the average American is willing to risk nuclear war if Russia invades Estonia as we are now required by treaty? Most Americans never heard of Estonia.

Russia and China understand only one thing - unbridled power and the willingness to use it. Nuclear weapons pointing at Russia and China from Greenland along with land-based laser defense systems guarantees our freedom. Not feckless Europeans who have already dragged us into two hideous world wars and want us to protect them from a third one while they pontificate mindless platitudes while hanging out at their beaches drinking fine Italian wines and gazing at attractive women in string bikinis.
Contact Dr. Bentivegna: jfbentivegna@gmail.com

name: David Crowley
subject: Making a career of humanity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crowley for Wisconsin
body:
This weekend, I was proud to join the St. Paul Baptist Church community in Racine, the oldest Black church in Wisconsin, for their 36th Annual MLK Day Prayer Breakfast. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvmfuXmYYW_FOYjb_3v61emWuNXO-wS3-aHqPhXdS_0AOJubYzSqDcubjA-pAHVBC87_XW0v_Yj-7XBxFQdfvbTote4rd4-pSpW07ywkKltv5Jlyw6Mt11o7Pqa63jROGG0WPT9ay6JOjgymT9fNzZDvX4h0v8yZUSCfBGKfhio6HeZqZOoUz6ywv51C5XxpA7f7aIVp54KE_7sakfZdEKMhdKPaAE8ll-OQi1Fszebvro58x_nuRFk5p3GKGMiZ_SNZr8yKDlYDdLfCW8YYpdYUOe9ngEEw5Vm9cfz9Msy0ikJVjWSVwY0Am2yOAVxIEs0KFgWWnYM-DoxKX9uyTqzoekgU9h-6rU9czrnRuxt4Q/4nf/Ri2zB2jVSMe0_RL1aqhuBQ/h0/h001.hCQ8-5F-wgfpjIsVSaLsGkUHbE0cEoh66g_ocpxRJh0)
---
_Make a career of humanity. Commit yourself to the noble struggle for equal rights. You will make a better person of yourself, a greater nation of your country, and a finer world to live in._
Happy MLK Day, Peter.

The Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. called us to live our values not just in words, but in action.

On this MLK Day, that means showing up for one another, rejecting division, and doing the work to build a Wisconsin where every family has dignity, opportunity, and a fair shot.

This weekend, I was proud to join the St. Paul Baptist Church community in Racine, the oldest Black church in Wisconsin, for their 36th Annual MLK Day Prayer Breakfast.

Dr. King’s legacy endures, in part, because it reaches beyond any one community.

He spoke in a way that invited people into the movement, even if they didn’t look like him, live like him, or share his background.

He reminded America of a fundamental truth: our freedoms are tied together.

If opportunity is denied to one community, it weakens the promise for all of us.

When we lift each other up, when we open doors instead of closing them, when we build bridges instead of walls, we honor the dream Dr. King shared with the world.

Together, we can make Wisconsin a place where every child, every family, and every community has the chance to thrive; where your future is defined not by circumstance, but by opportunity.

That is the Wisconsin I believe in. That is the Wisconsin we can build together.

Today and every day, let’s bear witness to Dr. King’s legacy and rededicate ourselves to the work of building a better future.

Onward,

-David

* * *

“I’m running for Governor because I know what it’s like to struggle — and I’ve spent my life fighting to make sure no one gets left behind. Every Wisconsinite, no matter where they live, deserves opportunity, safety, and a government that works. That’s what this campaign is about — delivering for **all of us.** ” – David Crowley
**_[Receive Fewer Emails](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39qe4agt7Ci5TsPrgF19WldmignKn5D5oIMDGaNVEbFcw9Ip3Wq9cCAxV8RtiFHgC5c0hAsdI506mZz4E3x7nwj9HHAIPFtOEwH6hZuzFJNRH_QcrRq1zdiozWxOk8KKWMgYMlikcHkuHBGgLO7Pk0kX6T24KaPGHqIFNOW42mNte0awfoHPzQDZvSlMviVICkkm6X-S4iFlZcmcl4qObE-VW_T-PPk97W2ps_sFWtsiQ/4nf/Ri2zB2jVSMe0_RL1aqhuBQ/h1/h001.FymrzLmD32Ma6aPf6g9bSXcWiz5m52qzSOFVLR38BuY)_** [**_Unsubscribe_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9PAX_s3k3Srd9OrW-l1UGElXuSwgCaPDGLaV4226VU4XBMLikdLTCDyHhxjUK9aP8jLfPv0pKcsvMV6AnSX8D8wxSPglf06zzdhWk5CdkOZoZU6SUvcsJyFtKZmH1AZ2HXY6qj5ToWdnEzgv5cnmvc1FHGc5lJYT8uVfPc6v60qTkwnoh88LT2HrxXQV0VrsYlyYpczTviAdXh2TIgiN9Y689R91dBA9tBIlMNcZyJGxhb1X2UNDxysBtjfE16wu_rpzryEa4tn45fEyja-BwEpRKW3n_cslFNUKD7Ld70UhA3qfD-aXn-idOwfzTBr1FIry7ZdmMqGk0Prjn7jV-tQ/4nf/Ri2zB2jVSMe0_RL1aqhuBQ/h2/h001.Ac8b2t42f2pOcIrTvIDI8FOLzm52yLelCczNI_4RJho) | Paid for by Crowley for Wisconsin

name: JD Vance
subject: I promised some important people a response from Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=9b984ee88f744260bd58e186f785dbb2&_e=TUGoHqMa_oMKc-qq6xyYz7KBDWymcEI2iY7F3O6mL_hko1bQAefMRQf6yW3x6guxFUwZr_saT4-QaB96IU0XrNCHkbaJcZEXoHL8yxRNkeuN6aOAHOflDm1XngC9SLLDJ8-UcNWTqYNqe6PSiBXPqbG90tSi5vru1HoShXdGiyB3_LBM0F0XrllEQX3XhcA8KlK8qYujnbcNLajoy8S1uhaLiEs3kKl2RaRj1zD_G6CUVrD3bFWLHUK5_WVs6Yc2R-vLgcfOS2vuiy9adC5Gi0lf0iK9UIovYQkEQgaHPaPhXxvDnNxPOoA_Vzj21lVa0m-sk_RFldDA0mhHKcfppPXmwPdYcLw1ryOnYHO7IEUFvXF-uB13V4Wx6BvmWWaPWN_yKlu69xkErV9-C9_4OZwKClsBBnqQreuV0rw5zXD0cbpecA-H53s4f431ltP8tMY82uk6SY3C77IyqbTJ1SdHntu6DrlrGkDVUy2T0rANB5FXyRxGY9qdd5Er4LQrOeNpKdZGMF-Id9gUBoFjg2Q50l-X_M1y99AZogHisJFDc5bWhwWq3psJ9a_zTgejohuXdJt-e_62b2R-uVS-PTPXak4n6JOYTXA-WxTiRXoZXi5CMzO7jwuIPsRsY80Nes-JmOxk5ZAL5GSZpH9nHW9o-60P7AVxnNxu_nL0H3ZUAVsSeC4bKGgswM10o95HLMJ5MkkMBEYBbB2u-6UZ825PKvx2eBCNJz2Xpamyvqpm2nDOYDPRdj0hCZItG3Qm7HHeTsunXbPvb5gAPL2xa9VHjBi_YmN8Y7ZeV_J2Nj50igYjF_pVlO3B6CP0BLS5hrRSS4Gy6B3Y1Nv6KOirZ3agNw4NspZnlCqdqNIVzsElIPWaVdkwW5iU-Ils2_3G)

I promised fellow Republican leaders a response from Patriot.

_And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. _

From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously.

**[I don’t want to have to show up to my meeting empty-handed. My parents worked hard just to get by, and like so many families around us, we relied on programs like Medicaid to survive. From a young age, I learned what it meant to fall through the cracks, and what happens when the people in power decide you’re expendable. That’s why I’ve spent my life standing up for working families who are too often ignored. _And it’s why David Valadao’s record is so infuriating._ He voted to gut Medicaid, even though nearly 70% of our district relies on Medi-Cal. He allowed critical ACA tax credits to expire on January 1st, driving up health insurance costs for families across the Valley. And only after people were hurt did Washington paper over the damage they caused. That’s the pattern: families suffer first, politicians react later. This race is one of the best chances in the country to hold a Republican accountable for betraying his constituents. CA-22 is flippable, but only if we build real momentum _now_. **[I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. I’m running a people-powered campaign, and every contribution matters. name: Team Taylor
subject: If this is our new normal, we need to get ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Grassroots supporters are the only force strong enough to compete with right-wing billionaire spending.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260119-1026&t=1&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)
Last year’s Wisconsin Supreme Court race broke spending records, with over _**$100 million**_ spent.
Nearly $30 million of that came from the richest man in the world — this guy. 👇
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260119_1_ak.DBdb8-&amount=10&refcode=em20260119-1026&t=3&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)
**Now, Elon Musk said he’s getting back into politics, just in time for our April election.**
If he decides to pour that kind of money into Wisconsin _again,_ we need to be ready.
Grassroots supporters are the only force strong enough to compete with right-wing billionaire spending.
[**That’s why we urgently need your support. With less than three months left, can you chip in $10 to strengthen our campaign’s defenses?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260119_1_ak.DBdb8-&amount=10&refcode=em20260119-1026&t=4&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260119_1_ak.DBdb8-&amount=10&refcode=em20260119-1026&t=23&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)**
Judge Chris Taylor has spent her career fighting for fairness and justice — as an attorney, a public servant, and a judge. She’s not running to serve donors or extremists. She’s running to serve Wisconsinites.
**But values alone won’t win this race.**
If right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk start dumping millions into Wisconsin to boost our extreme opponent, our chances at victory become much tougher.
Every contribution helps us stay ahead of any attacks and ensure we reach voters before right-wing special interests do.
[**If you’re able to, pitch in $10 to help us build the people-powered campaign it’ll take to win — no matter how much billionaires try to spend against us.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260119_1_ak.DBdb8-&amount=10&refcode=em20260119-1026&t=24&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260119-1026&t=25&refcode2=1033_294397_F_5Mhx&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1033%2E294397%2EF_5Mhx)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

Last year’s Wisconsin Supreme Court race broke spending records, with over $100 million spent. Nearly $30 million of that came from the richest man in the world — this guy. 👇 Now, Elon Musk said he’s getting back into politics, just in time for our April election. If he decides to pour that kind of money into Wisconsin again, we need to be ready. Grassroots supporters are the only force strong enough to compete with right-wing billionaire spending. Judge Chris Taylor has spent her career fighting for fairness and justice — as an attorney, a public servant, and a judge. She’s not running to serve donors or extremists. She’s running to serve Wisconsinites. But values alone won’t win this race. If right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk start dumping millions into Wisconsin to boost our extreme opponent, our chances at victory become much tougher. Every contribution helps us stay ahead of any attacks and ensure we reach voters before right-wing special interests do. Thank you, Team Taylor

name: Honor MLK's Legacy
subject: MLK’s Legacy Demands Action - Not Silence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
MLK Day is a call to courage, unity, and fighting for working families and democracy.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/E1nk2C3d5zCnuUIl44gSxg~~/AAUS1hA~/dLX273ApaeObhqzM3y_YcSf4TnPmDXq3kITTFYCC9rAJ0I5HcjaQ8DU4DmDltMYYeYoFEYVrg17e_ibELEkvAxCCcwf1vsYWxr09ouh2VR8-Z9fpFmHCCSD3pJwmc1u0)
| | Friend, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is often remembered for his words – but far less often for the **danger, sacrifice, and disruption** that made those words matter. **MLK Day is not about comfort. It’s about confrontation.** Dr. King understood something that still makes people uneasy today: **racial justice and economic justice are inseparable.** Poverty, racism, and fear are tools used to divide working people while those in power protect their wealth and authority. That is why he organized workers. That is why he embraced civil disobedience. And that is why the state surveilled him, jailed him, and ultimately took his life. **Progress has never been handed down politely.**
It has always been forced forward by ordinary people willing to take risks. Today, our country is facing a familiar test. We are watching **authoritarian power wrapped in the language of “law and order.”**
We are watching **ICE terrorize communities** and operate with dangerous levels of impunity.
We are watching **working families crushed by an affordability crisis** while corporations and political elites remain untouched.
And we are watching **chaos manufactured to keep people afraid, divided, and silent.** Dr. King warned us about this moment. He warned us about moderation that prioritizes order over justice. He warned us about waiting for a “better time” instead of acting when it matters most. So what does it mean to honor his legacy **right now**? **We fight for working families** – for wages people can live on, healthcare people can afford, and dignity at work.
**We defend our democracy** against those who seek to drag this country further into autocracy and rule by fear.
**We reject division** and unite as Americans with a common goal: a nation that works for everyday people, not just the powerful.
And **we choose courage over comfort** , even when that choice comes at a cost. **Hope is not passive. Hope is something we do.** Please continue to support my efforts to **fight for justice, protect democracy, and build a country worth handing down to our children and grandchildren.** This moment demands action – and it demands **all of us, together.** **[Help us turn courage into action and build a country worthy of our children and grandchildren.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qw6rMwjhqCjGV1KKdeP-pQ~~/AAUS1hA~/NIKZopKiDHUgz3l65PkBBPRPQ7PFQFnSFrBptbh9Z1sbzyxTES4lz6rntE3KBlr0kLbqApHgKrcoGKGzZBkFIvB8MAMQH8ZJ7UFkiusdE4wvXumDvwbnfPqu1kIl4BJqT95M7XHkFMYnnf2VDP2kvxBATLRR348yDFZ9nyZQCmc~)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/y5-3TVhW5iXwym3VVdY5wQ~~/AAUS1hA~/Qcnrc1KCeN5D8XdXELJbiiRc19AsFiRA-OF5IPRsjco8h5PhdhASiphTtde_flEUiUYSEH0oLA3zdlwE2BCd141yTxY032ZLub3Lio_Tb5PO_30K0N_LjrYdorM1Se7j3dvd0wPBA6vFW2pmpSuZUTCTHNWadg31d0esGtrKK2-Pv4ZcyVpjI7aum-oRcfn1) | [Chip in $25 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GUj1IgPhvui1KXqQRSu0Nw~~/AAUS1hA~/Qcnrc1KCeN5D8XdXELJbiiRc19AsFiRA-OF5IPRsjco8h5PhdhASiphTtde_flEUiUYSEH0oLA3zdlwE2BCd141yTxY032ZLub3Lio_Tb5NPg5V8M4qCtDJ-xyOn7BKlFufe5n6FY7nDaahUouJNc-3l3G-MG0othHzJFBX3t66YW3mFMIKul_OhcAWk-PjO)

clean_body: MLK Day is a call to courage, unity, and fighting for working families and democracy. | | | Friend, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. is often remembered for his words – but far less often for the danger, sacrifice, and disruption that made those words matter. MLK Day is not about comfort. It’s about confrontation. Dr. King understood something that still makes people uneasy today: racial justice and economic justice are inseparable. Poverty, racism, and fear are tools used to divide working people while those in power protect their wealth and authority. That is why he organized workers. That is why he embraced civil disobedience. And that is why the state surveilled him, jailed him, and ultimately took his life. Progress has never been handed down politely. It has always been forced forward by ordinary people willing to take risks. Today, our country is facing a familiar test. We are watching authoritarian power wrapped in the language of “law and order.” We are watching ICE terrorize communities and operate with dangerous levels of impunity. We are watching working families crushed by an affordability crisis while corporations and political elites remain untouched. And we are watching chaos manufactured to keep people afraid, divided, and silent. Dr. King warned us about this moment. He warned us about moderation that prioritizes order over justice. He warned us about waiting for a “better time” instead of acting when it matters most. So what does it mean to honor his legacy right now? We fight for working families – for wages people can live on, healthcare people can afford, and dignity at work. We defend our democracy against those who seek to drag this country further into autocracy and rule by fear. We reject division and unite as Americans with a common goal: a nation that works for everyday people, not just the powerful. And we choose courage over comfort , even when that choice comes at a cost. Hope is not passive. Hope is something we do. Please continue to support my efforts to fight for justice, protect democracy, and build a country worth handing down to our children and grandchildren. This moment demands action – and it demands all of us, together. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ~~ ---|--- We have listened to your feedback. Many of you asked for a new, secure way to support this campaign. You can now click ~ to donate via ~, which uses Stripe’s secure, encrypted payment system. Your personal information is protected and will never be shared. If you are interested in sending checks: Padora For Colorado PO Box 116 Severance, CO 80546 Let us show that a grassroots movement built on honesty, lived experience and working-class values can rise above fear, division and the politics of the powerful. John Padora Working Dad • Fighter • Engineer Candidate for Congress in CO 04 | Paid for by Padora for Colorado Padora for ColoradoPO Box 116Severance, CO 80546United States "Website"•~~ "Privacy Policy"

## Commonsense Corner:
---
Tim is disgusted, fired up, and ready to call it like he sees it—and who could blame him?

Last week, Congress threw billions of dollars at more pet projects that don’t do a dadgum thing for hardworking Americans. Here’s a [snapshot](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/wkpeCxrHbxuLqj06x2AwIcnJdtE1o19pmTDtwMvfnbZi7vCdiEY1_agQOH9dgyh2Tt7rBmJPmPD6EanMb7LoLP3fDfaXbJanH_P1ME5DhggGEhGu6U3Wy1R0hTdGyok6Nhj2PXG1MHcTzFolvKsPyRBTue9i_BCeaVHEr2TWYHuSsUJO02bH4al8F62Ss5hNkuM91jOl3odFNnI5XRv9uIa9lW68QG2QtQfCitD8PayDiETlHLq2iJxsaIUlyn80e8FVc0Jl8_ofp0aIJJKeMApF63-K6sJkDp5UNn6MVhe1Lc0fzZF5fvjQy41I9Zuo1EjGW-VgqTXLJz4YZR7wiMfHpliNN9wJc98VfrAzZK_56F-ZIEMmVjieT65xbSYEEkt5zhDeop7xFJNVmowekZDXJFcVUyZwdp2S_jH_lNpY4I9-HTqc4wM2gJcukCw/W3gw6tuzf7kuK-c4ynTJOZlbHl8XNuVk/16):
* **$20 million** for the Asia Foundation
* **$22 million** for the East-West Center
* **$1 billion** for Jordan to build a wall
* **$205 million** for the Human Rights and Democracy Fund
* **$315 million** for the [National Endowment for Democracy](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/0n92R_mqF_krVw6t3vg3uLmgW_LH_o_RmZokYCIHAz0cIOpQjS4kLNl1kSAstU54itz_Xym7LWpNc456UtwCZ-jMdL-q9s0sF8f9FUUewBqUs3ZkmTOWhRfhcumfFquR-BZ3zzC3l4sCu6IbxJ7LEz0ni-xfKlm52pud5oW0raEXrah61ZzsO0-Eu0a5YWrqwVIIBKXhutcCvtCAU7Wi313e_L9to9lonn9sbYAbwqLOh2KcKFFIP9qd9GNtGf0mAiA0SdkmmfhJMB1tZH9n0dnmGrUcVYiwq8h6asgveI2ncOIlpZP5qaAslbhwUmr1U7CvsNJGMSEEm7rL0fIgxczv45lQRsrWsVjqg3pBmsnusazubbouuV3VHFThRH9w8CobJI5LRUYI9OS98jnZ0jW9Y1RE2Wt53Q5xji9Jlg_7LoyIl6AuLBRS8dIsh_4/CbWBMA_76KsjgcDCcwKOZrN8414Tax1-/16) (an organization that tried to censor President Trump)

To sum it up, Congress spent billions on boondoggles. This is only the tip of the iceberg when it comes to Washington’s out-of-control spending, and career politicians in both parties are to blame. **We won’t sugarcoat it: Tim was pretty overcome seeing just how bad things have gotten in America after all this garbage spending got the green light. But there**** _is_****hope. We can fix this mess if we start holding our representatives accountable.** If you’re in East Tennessee, you can trust that Tim is doing everything in his power to talk some sense into his fellow Republicans. If you’re not, pick up the phone and call your members of Congress today. Tell them to stop funding nonsense and start putting AMERICA FIRST.

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: Tim is disgusted, fired up, and ready to call it like he sees it—and who could blame him? Last week, Congress threw billions of dollars at more pet projects that don’t do a dadgum thing for hardworking Americans. Here’s a : $20 million for the Asia Foundation $22 million for the East-West Center $1 billion for Jordan to build a wall $205 million for the Human Rights and Democracy Fund $315 million for the (an organization that tried to censor President Trump) To sum it up, Congress spent billions on boondoggles. This is only the tip of the iceberg when it comes to Washington’s out-of-control spending, and career politicians in both parties are to blame. We won’t sugarcoat it: Tim was pretty overcome seeing just how bad things have gotten in America after all this garbage spending got the green light. But there** ishope. We can fix this mess if we start holding our representatives accountable. If you’re in East Tennessee, you can trust that Tim is doing everything in his power to talk some sense into his fellow Republicans. If you’re not, pick up the phone and call your members of Congress today. Tell them to stop funding nonsense and start putting AMERICA FIRST. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Are you disappointed in the congressional Republicans who voted in favor of a spending bill that includes funding for wasteful programs and foreign priorities? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed | Small Biz Spotlight From to baked spaghetti, Tim visited his favorite food truck twice over the weekend. Head over to the Lonsdale Flea Market on Texas Avenue and find the to enjoy a good meal and help out some good local folks! | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- January 19, 2026
body:
|

---
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
Today as we observe the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., I had the honor and privilege of attending the Martin Luther King Jr. Wreath Laying Ceremony at the Stone of Hope. Right now more than ever, the words, life, and legacy of Dr. King are so critical. Back in 1963, when Dr. King was wrongfully arrested for protesting and confined in that lonely Birmingham jail cell, he explained his presence by writing, 'I am in Birmingham because injustice is here...Like Paul, I must constantly respond to the Macedonian call for aid.' Dr. King was prescient, ahead of his time in knowing that the call for aid would still sound. That's why we will never forget him. And as long as injustice has a home anywhere in this country, and as long as the dispossessed, disenfranchised, and voiceless are in need, Dr. King lives on in the hope that help is on the way. Especially now, in a time when the need for justice echoes as loud as ever, Dr. King's words ring true. Today, in a period where principled leadership is in short supply, this monument embodies his towering example. Generations have been fed by the fruits of his labor. And I'm able to stand on the floor of the Senate of the United States because I'm held up by the foundation of the work that he and so many others did. So, we did not lay this wreath today because we're worried that his memory will someday disappear. Dr. King lives on. That mission has already been accomplished. And I hope the King family can rest assured that he will never be forgotten. It was wonderful to join Harry Johnson, President/CEO of the Memorial Foundation, Pastors Grainger and Jo Ann Browning of Ebenezer AME Church of Ft. Washington, members of Alpha PAC and Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity, Inc., for the memorial observation. **Fighting for Affordability** I am proud to cosponsor Senator Chris Van Hollen's Power for the People Act, legislation to ensure Americans are not footing the bill for large data centers. The Power for the People Act holds data center operators accountable for their role in driving up energy prices through reforms that would prevent consumers from subsidizing data center development through their utility bills. It also ensures that data centers connecting to the grid do not overwhelm it, preventing grid reliability issues that result in power outages, and ensuring that all of this work is done with strong labor standards in place, creating good-paying jobs. **In the mid-Atlantic grid region (PJM)** , the nation's largest electric grid serving 67 million Americans in 13 states - including Maryland - and Washington, D.C., **because of data centers, consumers have paid or will pay** :
* At least $4.6 billion in 2024 and $3.1 billion in 2025 for local transmission upgrades, or $7.7 billion total for local transmission upgrades over two years according to the [Union of Concerned Scientists](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fblog.ucs.org%2fmike-jacobs%2ffinally-something-everyone-agrees-on-data-centers-should-cover-their-own-costs%2f&redir_log=875626291971785).
* Over $21 billion in capacity costs in the last three capacity auctions (July 2024, July 2025, and December 2025) alone (which are the costs to secure available energy supply for future years) due to projected data center demand. These costs were to secure supply for the period of June 2025 - May 2028, according to PJM's [Independent Market Monitor](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.monitoringanalytics.com%2freports%2fReports%2f2026%2fIMM_Analysis_of_the_20272028_RPM_Base_Residual_Auction_Part_A_20260105.pdf&redir_log=98130014393868).
* By 2028, the average household in PJM will see their energy bills increase by $70 per month because of data centers - that's $840 per year - and that's just due to rising capacity costs (not even taking into account all the other factors impacting energy bills like the price of wholesale energy and transmission costs). Capacity costs alone could balloon to $163 billion through 2033 if no action is taken to address the imbalance of supply and demand in PJM's capacity market, according to [NRDC](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.nrdc.org%2fbio%2ftom-rutigliano%2fbuilding-data-centers-without-breaking-pjm&redir_log=140931153481580).

Marylanders are struggling to get by - the costs of groceries, rent, and health care are skyrocketing. That's why it is absolutely essential that data centers cover the costs of increased energy prices they are creating: not hardworking American families. Data centers are critical to our national security, job creation, and economic development, but we cannot subsidize the costs of these data centers with our energy bills - which are already way too high. I will continue to fight alongside Senator Van Hollen, and my colleagues, to get this legislation passed. **Fighting for Women & Family Health** Last week, I questioned minority witness Dr. Nisha Verma, MD, a double board-certified obstetrician and gynecologist providing care for women in Georgia and Massachusetts, at the Health, Education, Labor and Pensions (HELP) Committee hearing, _" Protecting Women: Exposing the Dangers of Chemical Abortion Drugs."_ _**In case you missed it, the following are some of my remarks during the hearing:** _ "I would be remiss if I didn't start with saying that I heard my colleague very passionately talk about the fact that this is about the safety of women. I want to make it clear that this Administration and this Secretary couldn't care less about women, men, or children. In fact, they don't care about humans. And I want to be very clear, I could go down and delineate how that is true. But that is not the subject of today's hearing. But for the past year, we have all watched Secretary Kennedy and this Administration peddle conspiracy theories and junk science to dismantle public health structures in this country. So, I don't want anyone lecturing about the safety of women. These people don't care about humans. "Last week, in fact, we saw the latest example, with Kennedy recklessly eliminating the CDC's recommendation for a number of critical childhood vaccinations, very alarmingly, including the flu shot in the midst of a flu, basically a surge, a super flu. This is the moment that this man decides to eliminate the flu shot for children as a recommendation. Just like with the pediatric vaccine schedule, changing the rules on FDA approved drugs without scientific input, legitimate evidence on safety risk, or transparency, it will cause, we know, unnecessary fear for patients. RFK's same playbook is being used to target mifepristone, a safe and effective medication that has been approved by the FDA for over 25 years." _**Regarding a debunked "study" by the Ethics and Public Policy Center that is being held up by Republicans as a reason to limit access to Mifepristone, I said:**_ "This is clearly not the work of unbiased science, but an organization with a political agenda. One, based on the last publication I mentioned, that promotes that women are, in their view, inferior and should submit to men. And yet their work is being cited by state Attorneys General and Members of this Committee to roll back access to a drug that millions of women have used safely for decades... "This study from this conservative think-tank is not, in RFK's words, 'gold standard science.' It is self-published, lacks transparency, cannot be replicated, is rife with conflicts of interest, and includes flawed data." Click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3dao5CBO9PkXQ&redir_log=759382934377289) to watch my full line of questioning. **Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to fight for Marylanders through legislation and I am proud to have introduced and cosponsored legislation ranging from ensuring adequate funding for Medicare, to improving the quality of care for veterans, to compensation for airline passengers who suffer extreme delays. The following are just some of the pieces of legislation I have worked on over the last few weeks: **Bills I introduced** Transportation Project Accountability Act of 2026: This [bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2ffor-immediate-release-alsobrooks-introduces-legislation-to-strengthen-transparency-for-state-transportation-projects-for-immediate-release%2f&redir_log=869979246731370) would strengthen transparency, performance evaluation, and public reporting for major state transportation projects. Wildlife Crossings Program Reauthorization Act: This bipartisan [bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2falsobrooks-cramer-merkley-curtis-introduce-legislation-to-reauthorize-wildlife-crossings-program%2f&redir_log=864410053611074) would reauthorize the Wildlife Crossings Program, which is a competitive grant program with the goal of reducing Wildlife Vehicle Collisions while improving habitat connectivity for terrestrial and aquatic species. Medicare Investment and Gun Violence Prevention Act: This [bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fthehill.com%2fhomenews%2fsenate%2f5656018-democratic-senators-gun-tax-credits%2f&redir_log=398492003373550) would repeal the gun tax cuts included in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act and repurpose the funding to Medicare, which would equal $1.7 billion over the next decade. 21st Century STEM for Girls and Underrepresented Minorities Act: This bill would close persistent equity gaps in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics and expand high-quality STEM education access for girls and students from underrepresented communities. A bipartisan [resolution](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fsenate-passes-alsobrooks-collins-resolution-designating-november-as-national-homeless-children-and-youth-awareness-month%2f&redir_log=21020024871238) designating November 2025 as "National Homeless Children and Youth Awareness Month" (Passed the Senate!) **Bills I cosponsored** Power for the People Act: This bill seeks to rein in the rising electricity costs Americans are facing by addressing the huge amounts of energy required by data centers. Plant Powered School Meals Pilot Act: This bill would establish a pilot program to award grants to school food authorities to provide 100 percent plant-based food and milk options. No Political Enemies (NOPE) Act: This bill aims to protect individuals from politically motivated harassment and prosecution by reaffirming the right to free speech. It seeks accountability for government officials who misuse federal resources against political adversaries. Protecting Taxpayers from Risky Investments in Venezuela Act: This bill would prohibit the United States Government from funding Venezuela's oil and petroleum infrastructure. Essential Caregivers Act of 2025: This bipartisan bill reaffirms and enforces the right of all residents in long-term care facilities to have in-person access to a loved one, including when visitations are restricted due to a declared emergency. Honor Our Promise to Veterans Act of 2025: This legislation would invest in the Department of Veterans Affairs' (VA) aging infrastructure, improve VA's ability to recruit high quality health care employees, and improve the standards of care veterans receive. International Human Rights Defense Act of 2025: This bill seeks to build an unprecedented framework into U.S. diplomacy to protect LGBTQ+ rights worldwide. National Museum of the Blind People's Movement Act: This bill would designate the new Museum of the Blind People's Movement in Baltimore as the official National Museum of the Blind People's Movement. Once established, this museum will be the first to be blind-owned, operated, and led. Transparency in Recovery Assistance & Claims Knowledge (TRACK) Act: This bipartisan bill would implement a status tracker on the FEMA website, so victims of a disaster have easily available knowledge and insight of their claim's progress. Flight Delay and Cancellation Compensation Act: This bill would require airlines to provide passengers with cash compensation and free rebooking for hours-long flight delays. Prohibiting Unauthorized Military Action in Venezuela Act of 2025: This bill seeks to stop the President from using federal funds for military force in or against Venezuela without a specific Congressional Authorization for Use of Military Force. Strategic Plan for Aging Act: This bill would require the Assistant Secretary for Aging to award grants to states, Indian tribes, and tribal organizations to create or implement Multisector Plans for Aging and Aging with a Disability. Family Vaccine Protection Act: This bill seeks to safeguard scientific integrity in vaccine policy by codifying the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices; ensuring cost-free insurance coverage for recommended vaccines; and maintaining strong access for children and mothers--aiming to counter recent anti-vaccine efforts and restore public trust. A joint resolution to direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress. **Get Back on Your Feet** As a reminder, on Saturday, January 24, we are hosting a "[Get Back on Your Feet](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSdmXtSIr2pGAxhCCA5RZ2J8BXBJb85ig3p0tbGzu6AQxmllhA%2fviewform&redir_log=89522618923660)" event hosted in collaboration with United Way of the National Capital Area! This event - geared toward Southern Maryland residents - is designed to support Marylanders as they recover from the U.S. government shutdown, manage post-holiday financial strain, and navigate an unstable economy. Utility providers from across the region will be available to help consumers access information and assistance with their bills. Credit counselors, debt repair specialists, legal aid representatives, rental assistance and financial advisors will also be on site to offer guidance and resources. The credit improvement and repair resource table will provide Marylanders with practical guidance on rebuilding credit, understanding credit reports, and accessing tools to improve financial stability, helping them regain confidence and control over their financial future. Additionally, the College of Southern Maryland will incorporate their Center for Workforce Development which offers a range of workforce programs that provide quick credentialing and employment readiness. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSdmXtSIr2pGAxhCCA5RZ2J8BXBJb85ig3p0tbGzu6AQxmllhA%2fviewform&redir_log=89522618923660) **Stay in the Fight ** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office or connect with us at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov%2f&redir_log=346519414955204). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=15600.15627221.5863965.7190525)

Medicare Investment and Gun Violence Prevention Act: This would repeal the gun tax cuts included in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act and repurpose the funding to Medicare, which would equal $1.7 billion over the next decade. 21st Century STEM for Girls and Underrepresented Minorities Act: This bill would close persistent equity gaps in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics and expand high-quality STEM education access for girls and students from underrepresented communities. A bipartisan designating November 2025 as "National Homeless Children and Youth Awareness Month" (Passed the Senate!) Bills I cosponsored Power for the People Act: This bill seeks to rein in the rising electricity costs Americans are facing by addressing the huge amounts of energy required by data centers. Plant Powered School Meals Pilot Act: This bill would establish a pilot program to award grants to school food authorities to provide 100 percent plant-based food and milk options. No Political Enemies (NOPE) Act: This bill aims to protect individuals from politically motivated harassment and prosecution by reaffirming the right to free speech. It seeks accountability for government officials who misuse federal resources against political adversaries. Protecting Taxpayers from Risky Investments in Venezuela Act: This bill would prohibit the United States Government from funding Venezuela's oil and petroleum infrastructure. Essential Caregivers Act of 2025: This bipartisan bill reaffirms and enforces the right of all residents in long-term care facilities to have in-person access to a loved one, including when visitations are restricted due to a declared emergency. Honor Our Promise to Veterans Act of 2025: This legislation would invest in the Department of Veterans Affairs' (VA) aging infrastructure, improve VA's ability to recruit high quality health care employees, and improve the standards of care veterans receive. International Human Rights Defense Act of 2025: This bill seeks to build an unprecedented framework into U.S. diplomacy to protect LGBTQ+ rights worldwide. National Museum of the Blind People's Movement Act: This bill would designate the new Museum of the Blind People's Movement in Baltimore as the official National Museum of the Blind People's Movement. Once established, this museum will be the first to be blind-owned, operated, and led. Transparency in Recovery Assistance & Claims Knowledge (TRACK) Act: This bipartisan bill would implement a status tracker on the FEMA website, so victims of a disaster have easily available knowledge and insight of their claim's progress. Flight Delay and Cancellation Compensation Act: This bill would require airlines to provide passengers with cash compensation and free rebooking for hours-long flight delays. Prohibiting Unauthorized Military Action in Venezuela Act of 2025: This bill seeks to stop the President from using federal funds for military force in or against Venezuela without a specific Congressional Authorization for Use of Military Force. Strategic Plan for Aging Act: This bill would require the Assistant Secretary for Aging to award grants to states, Indian tribes, and tribal organizations to create or implement Multisector Plans for Aging and Aging with a Disability. Family Vaccine Protection Act: This bill seeks to safeguard scientific integrity in vaccine policy by codifying the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices; ensuring cost-free insurance coverage for recommended vaccines; and maintaining strong access for children and mothers--aiming to counter recent anti-vaccine efforts and restore public trust. A joint resolution to direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from hostilities within or against Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress. Get Back on Your Feet As a reminder, on Saturday, January 24, we are hosting a "" event hosted in collaboration with United Way of the National Capital Area! This event - geared toward Southern Maryland residents - is designed to support Marylanders as they recover from the U.S. government shutdown, manage post-holiday financial strain, and navigate an unstable economy. Utility providers from across the region will be available to help consumers access information and assistance with their bills. Credit counselors, debt repair specialists, legal aid representatives, rental assistance and financial advisors will also be on site to offer guidance and resources. The credit improvement and repair resource table will provide Marylanders with practical guidance on rebuilding credit, understanding credit reports, and accessing tools to improve financial stability, helping them regain confidence and control over their financial future. Additionally, the College of Southern Maryland will incorporate their Center for Workforce Development which offers a range of workforce programs that provide quick credentialing and employment readiness. Stay in the Fight ** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office or connect with us at . You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks United States Senator

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

President Trump's Border Czar,**Tom Homan** , says:
"The Heritage Foundation is the one truly patriotic organization I trust to fight for America's borders." Now, Heritage is working alongside the Trump team to implement a **policy blueprint for mass deportations** -- but we need proof that the American people stand behind it.

Your response to the **Official 2026 Mass Deportation Ballot** will show Washington that citizens want action -- not more excuses.

This is your chance to:
* Support President Trump's plan to deport illegal immigrants
* Demand an end to open borders
* Restore law and order across America

Make your voice heard before the deadline.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The far-right thinks they can bully their way into power. They’re in for a hell of a surprise
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I want you to hear me on this

I want you to hear me on this, Derek: As long as I’m your Governor, I will always stand up to protect your fundamental freedoms. I’ll continue to make Pennsylvania a place where a woman’s right to choose is the law. A place where you can marry who you love and worship how you please. A place where the union way of life is protected. [_**If that’s the kind of place you want to live in, I’m asking for your support to keep it a reality. Because make no mistake: The far-right has their eyes set on Pennsylvania, and they’ll spend every dime in their bank accounts to steal our Commonwealth’s future — _your_ future — for themselves.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123632003/596079057/1156619579?refcode=email_011926_rooftops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGFkOGEwMS03OGY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogTM9v1TA7L2P92txZx4DI_K7HPvORfSV9LRFCu4yCc=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123632004/596079058/1156619579?refcode=email_011926_rooftops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGFkOGEwMS03OGY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogTM9v1TA7L2P92txZx4DI_K7HPvORfSV9LRFCu4yCc=)
---
I’ll be honest: far-right politicians expect me to run away from my record throughout this campaign. To distance myself from everything we’ve accomplished together over the last three years.
Well Derek, they couldn’t be more wrong. I’m proudly running for reelection _on_ my record.
**Cutting taxes seven times?** _I’ll be shouting it from the rooftops._
**Delivering over 90 million free school breakfast meals each year?** _A no-brainer._
**Slashing red tape and making our government work for people?** _You’re damn right._
**Protecting the freedom to choose and marriage equality?** _Without question._
If the far-right thinks they can bully me into running away from my record, they’re in for a hell of a surprise, Derek. But _spreading the word_ about that record to millions of Pennsylvanians? That’s where things get expensive.
[_**If there’s anything at all you can chip in today, every dime will go directly toward getting this record out to undecided voters across Pennsylvania — the same voters who will decide the outcome of this competitive, consequential election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123632005/596079059/1156619579?refcode=email_011926_rooftops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGFkOGEwMS03OGY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogTM9v1TA7L2P92txZx4DI_K7HPvORfSV9LRFCu4yCc=)

name: Trey Trainor for Texas
subject: Protecting Parental Rights – THSC Endorses Me!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
See why THSC calls me a principled advocate for homeschool families in Congress...

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=d316038ab3)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=00b734841d&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,
As a former homeschooling father of six, I’ve experienced firsthand the incredible blessings of parents directing their children’s education free from government interference. That’s why I’m thrilled and deeply honored to share some exciting news today: the **Texas Home School Coalition (THSC)** — the leading voice defending homeschool freedoms and parental rights across our state — has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in TX-21!
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=c524d4a317&e=4d3fe76c62)
| |

Here’s what THSC said in their endorsement:
“Homeschool parent, Trey Trainor, is a candidate whom families in Texas Congressional District can look to as a principled advocate for their values and priorities. Trey has already demonstrated a clear commitment to defending parental rights and protecting family freedoms, which is why we are proud to support his candidacy. We believe he will serve as a strong voice for homeschool families in Congress.”
In Washington, we need proven conservatives who will stand up for **parental rights** , **family freedoms** , and **limited government** — values that THSC champions every day. I’m committed to fighting back against any federal overreach that threatens homeschooling, school choice, or the fundamental right of parents to raise their children as they see fit.
This is just the latest show of strong support as we build momentum toward the March 3, 2026 Republican primary. With your help, we’ll send a fighter to Congress who will defend the America First agenda, secure our border, protect our constitutional rights, and always put Texas families first.
If you’re excited about this news (and I hope you are!), here are a few ways you can join the fight:

* [**Donate today**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=fb0955fc35&e=4d3fe76c62) to fuel our grassroots campaign.
* [**Volunteer**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=35f42f614f&e=4d3fe76c62) — from phone banking to yard signs to precinct walking.
* **Spread the word** — forward this email to friends and family in CD21 and share on social media with #Trey4TX #TX21.

Together, we’re building a campaign rooted in faith, family, and freedom. Thank you for your continued support — it makes all the difference in keeping TX-21 strong and conservative.
God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas!
For TX-21 and America First,
**Trey Trainor**
Husband, Father of 6,Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
---
| [Donate Today](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=778f248069&e=4d3fe76c62)

|
---

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Welcome to the M4F Dispatch!
body:
Choosing humanity, together.

---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=12d11a018d&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | |
# _Remembering Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr._
---
|
---
| | Dr. King envisioned a world rooted in dignity, equality, and shared humanity. HIs work helped secure rights many of us benefit from today, but the fight for justice did not end with legislation or speeches. It persists now more than ever.
What we are witnessing now—from attacks on our schools and neighborhoods to an administration that prioritizes aggression and militarization over care and community—makes that painfully clear. Dr. King’s own words against “a nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift” still rings true for America today.
Honoring Dr. King’s legacy means more than remembering his words. It means carrying forward his values. It means leading with courage and love while choosing to honor humanity every day.
We are our own beloved communities. And it is our responsibility to protect them.
---
| |
# _On the Ground with M4F – ICE Out for Good_
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=78f41e08c8&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | Communities poured out across the country last week in protest to the continuous loss of life, escalation of violence, and propaganda campaigns of ICE – and CPB and M4F was right along with them.
At the Ice Out for Good rally, our Lead Spokesperson Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose delivered a powerful speech calling attention to the human cost of Trump’s anti-immigrant regime and the importance of collective action rooted in dignity and solidarity. Her message was clear: when our communities are under attack, silence is not an option.
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=9ddc3f3a82&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | In a year that has already tested our resolve, it’s important to recognize the victories that matter—especially the ones that protect our democracy. This year has already brought us real challenges, but there is meaningful progress still happening. Last week, Republican-led efforts to rush redistricting in order to secure a larger House majority will not take effect before the 2026 midterms.
That matters. Protecting fair maps means protecting our voting power, and giving communities a fighting chance to be heard.
This moment gives us an opening. Now is the time to hold onto the progressive leaders already in office and to organize around candidates who are prepared to fight for working people, defend our rights, and move us forward. Progress doesn’t happen by accident; it happens when we stay focused, engaged, and ready to act.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=3829b84bf1&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | Movement for Freedom is proud to launch our newest initiative:**the Prioritize Humanity Pledge.**
From the beginning, our work has centered on uplifting leaders who defend civil rights, protect dignity, and fight for people over profit. This pledge takes that commitment one step further.
The message is simple: if you believe in human rights, justice, and accountability, it’s time to make that commitment public.
The Prioritize Humanity pledge calls on both candidates and voters alike to affirm a shared responsibility to defend human dignity in policy, practice, and leadership. At a moment when cruelty and division are too often rewarded, we are choosing to draw a clear line and invite others to stand with us.
If you share these values, we invite you to add your name and join us. [Take the Prioritizing Humanity Pledge.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=4d78babb1e&e=81ab29c4d2)
And don’t ever forget to prioritize humanity, not hate.
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=2870bdadab&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| |

They might even remove him from office. Our country is hanging in the balance, and when you become a Sustaining Member, YOU become our first line of defense against the socialist Democrats. With the ongoing protests and riots in Minneapolis at the top of the news, it is important to remember why operations to arrest illegal immigrants are happening at such a heightened and visual pace.
Not only is the Trump administration pressuring illegal aliens in the United States to leave on their own accord, thus saving taxpayer money in the process, but it is to deter people in other parts of the world from even attempting the journey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/062473f7-e2b1-483d-8311-01b5c90b3cfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This trend was highlighted in a recent article from the BBC. While the main focus was how Hondurans who are in the United States illegally are sending more money back to their families before they are deported, the BBC interviewed one man who said the operations have made him stay put in Tegucigalpa, the country's capital.
"But I see what Trump is doing, and it's made me think twice," Elias Padilla admitted to the BBC, saying the plan was to send remittances once he found work in the United States.
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [Do Democrats have ](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_**[NO SHAME?](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/777754e6-aba1-41ed-bd4c-ab96385b31f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Do Democrats have _**NO SHAME?**_ First they called RFK Jr a "conspiracy theorist"...Then they filed **FAKE** articles of impeachment...Now liberal journalists have launched a phony RFK Jr affair scandal.

Even Tucker Carlson has called it a _**deep state HIT JOB to "destroy Trump by destroying Bobby." **_It's all part of a left-wing conspiracy to _**STOP**_ Kennedy from revealing **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**...Hundreds-of-billions in ill-gotten profits and political donations are at stake...

So Dems will stop at nothing to keep you from hearing
[THIS!](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Even for Democrats this is a new low. But they'll sink even deeper if it means you never get to see
[THIS!](https://substack.com/redirect/5be3d89e-2958-49e5-b3dd-f44b0cad27ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
"I'm going to wait to see what the change in government here brings," he added, referring to Honduras' recent presidential election. "Hopefully things will improve."
Now before any Trump supporter gets too excited about this news, Padilla went on to say that Trump's policies have only put his plans on hold, not cancelled.
"Even though he knows his chances of successfully settling in the US have diminished under Trump, Elias says he has little choice but to wait - for either the current wave of ICE raids or the entire Trump presidency to pass," **[the BBC reported.](https://substack.com/redirect/062473f7-e2b1-483d-8311-01b5c90b3cfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
This highlights that while closing the southern border to illegal immigration has been one of the most successful aspects to Trump's presidency, it can be a short-term victory since many of his immigration policies have not been sealed into law. The extra funding for the Department of Homeland Security is set for a few years, but if nothing else is codified, then a potential Democrat president can very easily undo the gains Trump has made.
As I saw during the Biden-Harris border crisis, it did not matter if illegal immigrants walked up to one of the gates within the border wall. Due to the open border policies of the Biden administration, Border Patrol agents were forced to open the gates to let people through to be processed and released.
The Biden-Harris border crisis showed people across the world that if they are willing to wait another couple of years, then the border will be opened once again. Padilla is far from the only person in Latin America, or the world for that matter, who is playing the long game. It will be up to voters in the next elections if they want to continue or destroy the historic progress that has been made.
* * *
* * *

name: Team AOC
subject: This is a fight to put the health, safety, and lives of every New Yorker above the greed of corporations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Take action today to support New York nurses on strike!
#
The largest nurses strike in New York state history is currently taking place and Alexandria just joined them on the picket line. Take a look:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35355?t=1&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)
More than 15,000 nurses are coming together to strike in demand of fair contracts that include protections from workplace violence and ensure safe staffing ratios.
This fight is not just about one or two hospitals. It's a fight to put the health, safety, and lives of every New Yorker that walks through its doors above the greed of corporations.
**[It takes all of us, acting together in solidarity to win. Take action today to support New York nurses on strike.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35334?source=em20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&t=2&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)**
**[Support New York nurses →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35334?source=em20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&t=3&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)**
More soon,
Team AOC

Through solidarity we can make a new world, a better country, where our work has dignity and our lives have respect.
Alexandria doesn't curry favor with billionaires or host exclusive fundraising events. This campaign's average donation floats around $17-20.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260119.cTjZt-&refcode=em20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260119.cTjZt-&refcode=em20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260119?refcode=em20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&t=24&refcode2=10612_2526796_UOYHWl&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260119-10612-P_ORG_VID_LAB&t=25&akid=10612%2E2526796%2EUOYHWl)**

---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:

| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38e1cf0414964a6a97e2029869dbc24b&_e=8P9F2ilgl8PoiqSDevIVNsqzu27EAdZ1JmZ3p51LNb2gWBqFozdfUbkp1edkOc2kaVkdJXwa-WBUWsnYCy-Fji8uGDjjAXqDmLVomRnX_Vudo3eb0drrlLgbxl3xPNvVR36WW9b2ixjzjoAKmDLapve_9CyAYpUFkZff7zitpIaX49jR7ySFris2Ekum9CUbsSSQi46traJ0PptOljiL2f_LRZgrk3pFFOfLYK0jda7IdVbnDaOBzbj-qHNeSQylaXFd7m48iV6_i83zXnt5tGC-wQUHFfCPT-fg9FCvQAtVLjPmielHfPGVeaChrQGpEOwHEhvZ2b4phnJXk45gl2ijwXpteqcJiLbYd0DVilIQsUECGHRZVS1Zvc8Em8iM5IwXoWtuZeMbwjQxrSsqKbCFntGLPf9WFHYiakoRtcrQFQpnQbk4_qCmD6CoKIWmOaobZv16iWI3kieOXPa6AttfEcq0NH3065YdGUMz0HusEDrTCwvutZ0zbrDwymRgIw81JJ9ZMO4Vw8AAhIP0Lr6-RcWwo3H_CKeStwm2nV927iB1hZUVk5tdiMfsrKN39X-LsBS5A73ZA4M1dBbJgLgKKrMsbU_unZATwCdISOtQ2vPfXZtktRYHkxVxGrjPkZH0kf09MIQ96zYZUwd5GHJOkP7427Jdupmay2B-ymaQC26sMK5t13-WUWWk5i7D)**

Fellow Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: Before Charlie was taken... he wrote this...| | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Fellow Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

**THEN** Hegseth JEOPARDIZED national security by sending classified war plans in an insecure group chat.

**NOW** he’s abusing his power to TARGET Democratic lawmakers who call out his crimes and defy Trump’s recklessness. __HE MUST GO NOW!__

I have spent long hours in prayer and conversation with those I trust most. I know leadership means accepting the heaviest burdens, and this choice has been the weightiest of my career.
I've looked at the data, I've listened to the concerns of families in your state, and I've finally reached my conclusion. I am sharing this news only with a select few today.
The fate of our movement depends on the leaders we choose to follow and the lines we choose to draw. I have drawn mine. clean_body: I sent you a message earlier that I cannot allow to go unanswered. Forgive my persistence, but I've reached a point where I have to move, and I desperately need to know your thoughts before I do. I have spent long hours in prayer and conversation with those I trust most. I know leadership means accepting the heaviest burdens, and this choice has been the weightiest of my career. I've looked at the data, I've listened to the concerns of families in your state, and I've finally reached my conclusion. I am sharing this news only with a select few today. The fate of our movement depends on the leaders we choose to follow and the lines we choose to draw. I have drawn mine. With unwavering resolve, Mike Pompeo | | | | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. 8136 Old Keene Mill Road Suite A300 Springfield, VA 22152 |
