name: Working Families Party
subject: Nearly 60 years later, MLK's fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, In 1967, Martin Luther King Jr. gave a speech at New York’s Riverside Church condemning the Vietnam War and the choices that lead us to violence. Nearly 60 years later, as greed for resources and power have driven this administration to invade Venezuela and attack people protesting state violence on the street here in the United States, the fight for King’s “revolution of values” continues. We’ve excerpted a portion of that speech, “Beyond Vietnam — Time to Break Silence,” to share with you today. **[For the full speech, click here to read or listen.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfiL_TBZU5xQYBQQ6do_j0mojH-IKNDnMgvgT_iOMB3i_REs0Jbt_3hmmq1R9-KRr_wEMLG7X6BMVa-n8AswVDms5V91HStAZqrZXzJmGWHMlvPYJMkx6l2DCLLZAEIn00Xx6CGK6jqeT7zlmz6syGeqqFeWK1753uVSUyy2P0flLARV8BXqklhtoq0fZlxQhZ0eFaZaBg-6zylAA2vnJEC5vMRMkLvWI55L8nSz5CfDptdicuXM3g1TXjk9CGIM91wsvXtFG7gOH29NWTjFThRtJbktads6i8un1wwwajfLNxzVO8SVTvTC_p_069I2bKVnxuDBX_l8Vx42ulKZqS8/4nf/Ig9Ed0O4SwijISINN1Km8w/h0/h001.qMz5UbV1XReBZFBMzTC0xVVowAf7j6SscJhrh3PdX6w)** From “Beyond Vietnam — Time to Break Silence” by Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
> In 1957, a sensitive American official overseas said that it seemed to him that our nation was on the wrong side of a world revolution. During the past ten years, we have seen emerge a pattern of suppression which has now justified the presence of U.S. military advisors in Venezuela. This need to maintain social stability for our investments accounts for the counterrevolutionary action of American forces in Guatemala. It tells why American helicopters are being used against guerrillas in Cambodia and why American napalm and Green Beret forces have already been active against rebels in Peru. It is with such activity in mind that the words of the late John F. Kennedy come back to haunt us. Five years ago he said, "Those who make peaceful revolution impossible will make violent revolution inevitable." Increasingly, by choice or by accident, this is the role our nation has taken, the role of those who make peaceful revolution impossible by refusing to give up the privileges and the pleasures that come from the immense profits of overseas investments. I am convinced that if we are to get on the right side of the world revolution, we as a nation must undergo a radical revolution of values. We must rapidly begin...we must rapidly begin the shift from a thing-oriented society to a person-oriented society. When machines and computers, profit motives and property rights, are considered more important than people, the giant triplets of racism, extreme materialism, and militarism are incapable of being conquered. A true revolution of values will soon cause us to question the fairness and justice of many of our past and present policies. On the one hand, we are called to play the Good Samaritan on life's roadside, but that will be only an initial act. One day we must come to see that the whole Jericho Road must be transformed so that men and women will not be constantly beaten and robbed as they make their journey on life's highway. True compassion is more than flinging a coin to a beggar. It comes to see that an edifice which produces beggars needs restructuring. A true revolution of values will soon look uneasily on the glaring contrast of poverty and wealth. With righteous indignation, it will look across the seas and see individual capitalists of the West investing huge sums of money in Asia, Africa, and South America, only to take the profits out with no concern for the social betterment of the countries, and say, "This is not just." It will look at our alliance with the landed gentry of South America and say, "This is not just." The Western arrogance of feeling that it has everything to teach others and nothing to learn from them is not just. A true revolution of values will lay hand on the world order and say of war, "This way of settling differences is not just." This business of burning human beings with napalm, of filling our nation's homes with orphans and widows, of injecting poisonous drugs of hate into the veins of peoples normally humane, of sending men home from dark and bloody battlefields physically handicapped and psychologically deranged, cannot be reconciled with wisdom, justice, and love. A nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift is approaching spiritual death. America, the richest and most powerful nation in the world, can well lead the way in this revolution of values. There is nothing except a tragic death wish to prevent us from reordering our priorities so that the pursuit of peace will take precedence over the pursuit of war. There is nothing to keep us from molding a recalcitrant status quo with bruised hands until we have fashioned it into a brotherhood.
As ever, thank you for being with us in the fight for peace over war, justice over greed, and progress over status quo defeatism. In solidarity, Working Families Party To support our movement to build a government that works for the people, not the powerful, if you’re able, **[please make a donation to the Working Families Party today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9afUXoxTPjQPJKWeSvT48PRb4LIMslBB_4hdZX00qU4MqmQt8Zdxu-waP9s0XPu0REsLuebD1ng-ZSEX5ltK3oiKtFzqqWft-XvtUOjrVVILBQKlb70ovYfoRdGo7ieVcQIHHKvLSlVJHfLVVtRmTGfN7yH7q-JkL3A-5V-23lZ8er8Z1c2W8MKB_L4exGkdQmmBYZazO51kSxMCzMLSrU9ZU6N39nh0nnG_GIca2o-Q00v-prryLMRlo0OOO9-d2CAXD3YnCAz7jcqjrNF3CLi5vQi12ej0Ur8HeCxkcuYrSuEztI7fNzze7UbcgTWujZ4PGH9Sw7gFjKxazB85BgiD1dakKEqz_RnWGCUnt5Axj6OsWVZ4qfkUoIatQFyuS/4nf/Ig9Ed0O4SwijISINN1Km8w/h1/h001.luG-dv1CjxNjauZVaadHfzEIeUZyCeLFbnpB1NNUmQ4)** clean_body: | | | Peter, In 1967, Martin Luther King Jr. gave a speech at New York’s Riverside Church condemning the Vietnam War and the choices that lead us to violence. Nearly 60 years later, as greed for resources and power have driven this administration to invade Venezuela and attack people protesting state violence on the street here in the United States, the fight for King’s “revolution of values” continues. We’ve excerpted a portion of that speech, “Beyond Vietnam — Time to Break Silence,” to share with you today. From “Beyond Vietnam — Time to Break Silence” by Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. In 1957, a sensitive American official overseas said that it seemed to him that our nation was on the wrong side of a world revolution. During the past ten years, we have seen emerge a pattern of suppression which has now justified the presence of U.S. military advisors in Venezuela. This need to maintain social stability for our investments accounts for the counterrevolutionary action of American forces in Guatemala. It tells why American helicopters are being used against guerrillas in Cambodia and why American napalm and Green Beret forces have already been active against rebels in Peru. It is with such activity in mind that the words of the late John F. Kennedy come back to haunt us. Five years ago he said, "Those who make peaceful revolution impossible will make violent revolution inevitable." Increasingly, by choice or by accident, this is the role our nation has taken, the role of those who make peaceful revolution impossible by refusing to give up the privileges and the pleasures that come from the immense profits of overseas investments. I am convinced that if we are to get on the right side of the world revolution, we as a nation must undergo a radical revolution of values. We must rapidly begin...we must rapidly begin the shift from a thing-oriented society to a person-oriented society. When machines and computers, profit motives and property rights, are considered more important than people, the giant triplets of racism, extreme materialism, and militarism are incapable of being conquered. A true revolution of values will soon cause us to question the fairness and justice of many of our past and present policies. On the one hand, we are called to play the Good Samaritan on life's roadside, but that will be only an initial act. One day we must come to see that the whole Jericho Road must be transformed so that men and women will not be constantly beaten and robbed as they make their journey on life's highway. True compassion is more than flinging a coin to a beggar. It comes to see that an edifice which produces beggars needs restructuring. A true revolution of values will soon look uneasily on the glaring contrast of poverty and wealth. With righteous indignation, it will look across the seas and see individual capitalists of the West investing huge sums of money in Asia, Africa, and South America, only to take the profits out with no concern for the social betterment of the countries, and say, "This is not just." It will look at our alliance with the landed gentry of South America and say, "This is not just." The Western arrogance of feeling that it has everything to teach others and nothing to learn from them is not just. A true revolution of values will lay hand on the world order and say of war, "This way of settling differences is not just." This business of burning human beings with napalm, of filling our nation's homes with orphans and widows, of injecting poisonous drugs of hate into the veins of peoples normally humane, of sending men home from dark and bloody battlefields physically handicapped and psychologically deranged, cannot be reconciled with wisdom, justice, and love. A nation that continues year after year to spend more money on military defense than on programs of social uplift is approaching spiritual death. America, the richest and most powerful nation in the world, can well lead the way in this revolution of values. There is nothing except a tragic death wish to prevent us from reordering our priorities so that the pursuit of peace will take precedence over the pursuit of war. There is nothing to keep us from molding a recalcitrant status quo with bruised hands until we have fashioned it into a brotherhood. As ever, thank you for being with us in the fight for peace over war, justice over greed, and progress over status quo defeatism. In solidarity, Working Families Party To support our movement to build a government that works for the people, not the powerful, if you’re able, Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name: It's time for immigration reform >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
This is personal for me
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633061/596082876/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZWVhNS04MWY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fZaBr2zbD5qj4LpCIUN4K36Gd9ufghD7kgTn7iVr3M=)
As a proud and patriotic immigrant, I want every kid to have the same shot I had — the shot that allowed me to give back to this country.
But today, millions of kids and families are being denied that same chance. So I’m asking you to stand with me and demand real, comprehensive immigration reform.
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633062/596082877/-1909961190?refcode=260119_RG_personal-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZWVhNS04MWY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fZaBr2zbD5qj4LpCIUN4K36Gd9ufghD7kgTn7iVr3M=&emci=d5f569fe-5ff5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8ef9eea5-81f5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)
My mom brought me to this country not knowing English and without an education. But thanks to a progressive immigration law passed by Congress in the 1980s, we were able to apply for permanent legal residency. I became a U.S. citizen in my early 20s.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633063/596082878/-1909961190?refcode=260119_RG_personal-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZWVhNS04MWY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fZaBr2zbD5qj4LpCIUN4K36Gd9ufghD7kgTn7iVr3M=&emci=d5f569fe-5ff5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8ef9eea5-81f5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)
_**That act of Congress changed everything. **_
America gave me the opportunity to go to school, to serve my community, and to become the first LGBTQ immigrant ever elected to Congress. I know my story isn’t typical, but it should be. I believe every family should have access to that same pathway to success.
Right now, Congress should be an institution that helps people — not one that blocks progress or plays politics with families’ futures. But we’re facing big, structural challenges:
* Generational poverty
* Concentrated wealth and power
* Attacks on democracy
* Systemic racism
* And a fringe minority inside the GOP is determined to stop any meaningful immigration reform

I’ve seen firsthand that coalitions can be built — even when the opposition is entrenched, ideological, and loud. We can do big things when we insist on justice and fight for opportunity.
**That’s why I need you with me. Congress cannot keep punting on this. Families cannot wait. Kids cannot wait. ****[Add your name right now to show your support for immigration reform:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633064/596082879/-1909961190?refcode=260119_RG_personal-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZWVhNS04MWY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fZaBr2zbD5qj4LpCIUN4K36Gd9ufghD7kgTn7iVr3M=&emci=d5f569fe-5ff5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8ef9eea5-81f5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633065/596082880/-1909961190?refcode=260119_RG_personal-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZWVhNS04MWY1LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fZaBr2zbD5qj4LpCIUN4K36Gd9ufghD7kgTn7iVr3M=&emci=d5f569fe-5ff5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8ef9eea5-81f5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)
Thank you for believing in a more compassionate, inclusive, and hopeful America.
Robert Garcia

clean_body: This is personal for me = As a proud and patriotic immigrant, I want every kid to have the same shot I had — the shot that allowed me to give back to this country. But today, millions of kids and families are being denied that same chance. So I’m asking you to stand with me and demand real, comprehensive immigration reform. My mom brought me to this country not knowing English and without an education. But thanks to a progressive immigration law passed by Congress in the 1980s, we were able to apply for permanent legal residency. I became a U.S. citizen in my early 20s. That act of Congress changed everything. America gave me the opportunity to go to school, to serve my community, and to become the first LGBTQ immigrant ever elected to Congress. I know my story isn’t typical, but it should be. I believe every family should have access to that same pathway to success. Right now, Congress should be an institution that helps people — not one that blocks progress or plays politics with families’ futures. But we’re facing big, structural challenges: Generational poverty Concentrated wealth and power Attacks on democracy Systemic racism And a fringe minority inside the GOP is determined to stop any meaningful immigration reform I’ve seen firsthand that coalitions can be built — even when the opposition is entrenched, ideological, and loud. We can do big things when we insist on justice and fight for opportunity. That’s why I need you with me. Congress cannot keep punting on this. Families cannot wait. Kids cannot wait. ** Thank you for believing in a more compassionate, inclusive, and hopeful America. Robert Garcia = = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: H. Stevens
subject: Following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I need you on my grassroots team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)
Null, I wanted to follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 57 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and **I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking:[_Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12301?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12301?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.
Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What people like you have been telling me
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12334?t=4&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)
---
Hi null,

I’ve been on the road, visiting communities all across Michigan – and everywhere I go, I hear the same things:
🩺 People are anxious about affording health care.
🛟 They’re worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

💰 Grocery prices are too damn high.

👷 Working Michiganders want real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

🗳️ And many are deeply concerned about our civil rights, democracy, and basic freedoms.
These aren’t political talking points – they’re real concerns from real people. And that’s exactly why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Michigan. Because when I see a problem, I get to work:
✅ I helped save 200,000 jobs as part of President Obama’s Auto Rescue Task Force.

✅ I led the charge to bring semiconductor manufacturing back to Michigan.

✅ I introduced the No Tariffs on Groceries Act to stop reckless food tariffs that are raising grocery prices.

✅ And I filed articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. for endangering public health.
I was recently named one of the most effective lawmakers in Congress – because I pride myself on showing up, listening, and delivering for working families.

Now I’m bringing that same grit to this battleground Senate race. With polls showing I’m the Democrat best positioned to defeat MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, GOP megadonors are set to spend millions to flip this seat red.
So I’m asking: _[**Will you be one of the 15,000 grassroots supporters we need to endorse this campaign before midnight tonight? We're just 14% short, and your name would mean a lot, null. >>**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12301?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)_
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12301?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)
---
Thank you for standing with me.
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12301?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12334?t=8&akid=1970%2E49239%2Ezw7rbD)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: JB Pritzker
subject: The stakes in New Hampshire could not be higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99676?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU)
Peter, it’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $10 or more between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots to keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99676?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $10 between Chris’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99676?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99677?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99676?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU)
---
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99676?refcode=em20260119-9950&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9950%2E614464%2EN1YNFU)**
With gratitude,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois

**I’ll tell you what’s on my mind: $12 and a dream.** That's what my parents, Manuel and Maria, started with when they came to California from Mexico.
Thanks to hard work and opportunity, they made it — owning a home, sending four kids to college or the military, and retiring with dignity.
To me, that's the California Dream — and that's what I'm running to protect.
Because today, despite having the fourth-largest economy in the world, that dream is slipping away for too many young adults and families. They're facing rising costs for housing, childcare, and groceries — and wages aren't keeping up.
**This is a break-glass moment.**
I've spent my career serving Californians — in the state legislature, Congress, as CA Attorney General, and as US HHS Secretary. As AG, I sued Donald Trump more than 120 times and protected the Affordable Care Act. As Secretary, I led HHS’ pandemic response. I negotiated the first-ever Medicare drug price reductions.
Now I'm running for Governor to rebuild our state's economy, create opportunities and lower costs for working families, and protect the California we all love. Your input will help shape how we move forward.
| [COMPLETE SURVEY NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123633535/596084738/-1361015638?refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20260119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTgwMjlkYmQtODNmNS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DaTFlBIWNNiU9geQay5dH-3cJ_BGBwokpY7-daYfYRU=&emci=d28ef929-75f2-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=a8029dbd-83f5-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=8078851)

clean_body: | Hi there, have you filled out my survey yet? This campaign for Governor is in full swing, and I want to hear from you about what matters most to you: | | I’ll tell you what’s on my mind: $12 and a dream. That's what my parents, Manuel and Maria, started with when they came to California from Mexico. Thanks to hard work and opportunity, they made it — owning a home, sending four kids to college or the military, and retiring with dignity. To me, that's the California Dream — and that's what I'm running to protect. Because today, despite having the fourth-largest economy in the world, that dream is slipping away for too many young adults and families. They're facing rising costs for housing, childcare, and groceries — and wages aren't keeping up. This is a break-glass moment. I've spent my career serving Californians — in the state legislature, Congress, as CA Attorney General, and as US HHS Secretary. As AG, I sued Donald Trump more than 120 times and protected the Affordable Care Act. As Secretary, I led HHS’ pandemic response. I negotiated the first-ever Medicare drug price reductions. Now I'm running for Governor to rebuild our state's economy, create opportunities and lower costs for working families, and protect the California we all love. Your input will help shape how we move forward. | Thanks for taking the time. Xavier Becerra | = Becerra for Governor 2026 330 N Brand Blvd Suite 700 Glendale, CA 91203 United States mailto:info@xavierbecerra2026.com | Paid for by Becerra for Governor 2026

Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.

This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Fellow Patriot make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time — and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2cce0b24a8d849f7897d3ecd095dac86&_e=iiB4TqPhHSVm2VbBU8G3ZlWxQHB_ivA0cDf6Sf_AN0ts9cB10sCJJUBK1iBLyzgQyZIi3YRqoCjdWjrMQ2BjLShs4q6au10mqQNlivsFzrnVdFcORe5x8Hd9IfDkRmP2Caqr15rWl4jydDiieN__IE26ewoJ3xLgvWBYgbcPbvfa2aqAecTLB_eMjmdKajTHF2iQLjJO5ysCZ25447QWnXQgJ5OrRl-ebYM9oYcDOeNtTYLFD7gtSX9Whqu5OyPg__fynKAsJD0RLmAhtmKN0YCONeoXbnrZhn_gAP2aEJq6Ava-zxWZu0gASmvJ9m58BZuSJ9lCHSKaqjw2G1GMuyZ4NgmGYwXAaWznYdYVLdvBp7kuNoAYEpfaa9AFFv5E79lLP3_7keh2CIduD9o5Qlc4KNzEvt4bUd3OhF_Fmjpv8tfsSebk0mBEPs-U9QU38V85Me33MbfZ_mcbn8Bz9zWTBLSMWsx2I7k2rdTTGQP-5PPktI6UbznB2_ei7iMz1DcNfd7HpNuIkeeR-aR_6DnWOZjWVmMpSbc2H3IDgczpcNrSmHZT1XoR_n6dYDuGGTmHVGTNmYCph28Lq_3540tBhK6Uz_xO1lSgNmkSRgV1ks5Cas7hgIxycsllHnGq895v7CwpbN4duZ74TLtX6ORAaFyQwQ2PKEtXT5rNzJsPdT0BadQ9AGXz-ElXsFT2pkVRHMk7nPZRfX6QU6yUsY9V9k0mlRDMZteECRlDkqwvgk6wAREZqRw4lD5nYe5EX0-PVBHGgqKK6vPv0Pk4Yg%3D%3D)

## [Watch Crane hand this guy's butt to him in front of the whole nation:](https://substack.com/redirect/92cb429c-25d7-4674-b2ce-5efa210e7285?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# Trump DOJ THREATENS Don Lemon with federal charges after disgraceful church protest stunt
Assistant Attorney for Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon said former CNN host Don Lemon **[is on her target list to face federal charges](https://substack.com/redirect/25e92734-2a70-4b95-ad1a-e4ab2d77d491?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his involvement in an anti-ICE protest that disrupted a church service on Sunday, warning that multiple crimes were committed during the protest and those involved could face lengthy prison sentences.
## [WATCH Don Lemon nuke his own career AGAIN!:](https://substack.com/redirect/55a5d385-1e28-4def-aef2-ebd48685cc33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/55a5d385-1e28-4def-aef2-ebd48685cc33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/55a5d385-1e28-4def-aef2-ebd48685cc33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Possible charges include FACE Act and KKK Act violations:** While Dhillon did not specify exact charges, she pointed to possible violations of the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act and the Ku Klux Klan Act, noting "the Biden DOJ used the Klan Act conspiracy charges tacked onto the FACE Act in the case of protests outside abortion clinics to bring much longer sentences," with the KKK Act punishable by more than a decade in prison and hefty fines.
* **Lemon 's "journalism" defense dismissed as insufficient:** Dhillon suggested Lemon could face criminal charges despite being embedded with protesters as an independent journalist, saying "Don Lemon himself has come out and said he knew exactly what was going to happen inside that facility. He went into the facility, and then he began 'committing journalism,' as if that's sort of a shield from being a part, an embedded part of a criminal conspiracy, it isn't."
* **DOJ gathering facts before filing charges, warns future protesters:** Dhillon said the Justice Department is still gathering facts and getting its "ducks in a row" before filing charges, warning "Come next Sunday, nobody should think in the United States that they're going to be able to get away with this. Everyone in the protest community needs to know that the fullest force of the federal government is going to come down and prevent this from happening and put people away for a long, long time," as the church was targeted because one pastor reportedly works for a local ICE field office.

**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[RFK Jr's Capitol Hill confession ROCKS congress](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Not long ago RFK Jr went toe-to-toe with senate Dems on Capitol Hill... And he was NOT holding back.
What he EXPOSED left the room in stunned silence.
**[An emerging health threat](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that affects over one hundred million Americans. And if you were born on or before January 1st, 1965... then you're most at risk.
Angry Democrats mocked him as a conspiracy theorist...
Just like they did when he warned about the COVID Lab leak, microplastics and corruption in the FDA...
All of which now appear to be _**100% TRUE**_.
Which is exactly why you need to hear RFK Jr's 2026 warning _**NOW**_.
You can **[get full details here now](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. I'll be blunt, if you're over the age of 60 then the RFK Jr warning exposed in this video will make you angry... but it could also save your life. **[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/f622a30a-8557-4cf3-999a-50c9dd774a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.

# **Protesters occupy Target store, claim retailer facilitating ICE operations**
**[Anti-ICE protesters staged a sit-in inside a Target store](https://substack.com/redirect/db7ac1e6-6876-4d57-b08a-fc7db5e1d1e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in St. Paul, Minnesota on Monday, claiming the retailer was allowing ICE agents to use its parking lots as a "meeting place" and "staging ground" and demanding Target take a stand against federal immigration authorities, with one protester holding an "Abolish ICE" sign saying "ICE agents are using the toilets at Target, so they're facilitating this invasion."
## [WATCH: ](https://substack.com/redirect/db7ac1e6-6876-4d57-b08a-fc7db5e1d1e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/db7ac1e6-6876-4d57-b08a-fc7db5e1d1e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/db7ac1e6-6876-4d57-b08a-fc7db5e1d1e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Demonstrators demand protection for families, call ICE operations "ethnic cleansing":** Protesters sat in the middle of the store chanting and calling on Target to "stand with the community to protect our tiny children from losing their parents," with one protester claiming "They're not at all participating in challenging this ethnic cleansing we're seeing in this country" and another demanding better treatment of immigrants and their right to decent housing and opportunities.

* * *
# **Elon Musk donates $10 Million to Kentucky Senate race backing anti-McConnell candidate**
Elon Musk donated $10 million to support **[Republican Senate challenger](https://substack.com/redirect/8923018c-ff7d-4a1d-9b53-e87c0ef86449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/8923018c-ff7d-4a1d-9b53-e87c0ef86449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Nate Morris in Kentucky's competitive primary to replace retiring Mitch McConnell, marking his largest federal contribution outside President Trump's campaigns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/710fde35-7c86-4a28-91dc-f6dae88b4a1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Significant financial boost:** The SpaceX CEO's donation last week to Morris-backing super PAC Fight for Kentucky--which held just under $50,000 cash on hand as of July 31--came after Musk spoke with the waste management entrepreneur and "came away impressed with the candidate's business background and anti-establishment, anti-Mitch McConnell message."
* **Three-way primary battle:** Morris, 45, who sold recycling firm Rubicon for $2 billion, faces Rep. Andy Barr who raised over $6.42 million by December 31 and former Attorney General Daniel Cameron, with Morris heavily attacking McConnell for "trashing Trump" after the 2020 election and labeling his opponents as the ex-leader's "puppets."
* **Campaign warfare intensifies:** Barr's manager dismissed the cash infusion claiming "The more money Nate Morris spends, the more Kentuckians get to see him and the worse he does," attacking Morris for supporting Nikki Haley over Trump and promoting DEI policies, while Morris spokesman fired back that "Andy Barr is in full-on meltdown mode" as Morris gains momentum with MAGA movement support.

Musk's contribution follows his earlier pledge to spend less on midterms, though he's since contributed $45 million to his America PAC, donated to GOP congressional PACs, and warned "America is toast if the radical left wins."
* * *
# **Most potential 2028 Dem presidential candidates dodge trans questions ...**
Nearly all top Democratic contenders for the 2028 presidential nomination refused to definitively state whether [a man can become a woman](https://substack.com/redirect/37b9af9e-c588-4221-bbad-988d81785403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when questioned by Axios, with only former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel providing a clear answer.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37b9af9e-c588-4221-bbad-988d81785403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Wide reluctance to engage:** Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Illinois Governor JB Pritzker, and California Governor Gavin Newsom all declined commenting on whether transgender girls born male should compete in girls' sports, whether minors should access puberty blockers and hormones, and whether biological sex can change, with Axios finding "most didn't want to talk."
* **Limited responses:** Emanuel alone maintained his previous stance that men cannot become women and biological boys shouldn't play girls' sports, while Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro deferred to local sports officials despite personally opposing "unfair advantages," and Pete Buttigieg's team referenced his past acknowledgment of "serious fairness issues" while urging compassion for transgender people.
* **Newsom 's evasive answer:** The potential 2028 frontrunner stumbled when pressed by conservative commentator Ben Shapiro on his podcast, saying "Yeah, I just don't--Well, I think, for the grace of God. Yeah" before deflecting to "so few people...struggling with gender identity issues" and claiming "so much hate and bigotry," despite previously calling transgender female sports participation "deeply unfair."

* * *

name: Mike Johnson, 56th Speaker of the House
subject: For Peter only
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement.

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

subject: Peter, did you fall asleep again?
body:
I’ve tried reaching you for DAYS!

| | | | Good heavens, Peter! Did you fall asleep again?

I've tried reaching you for DAYS with an urgent & dire message, and I’m hoping I finally caught you at a good time.

[Please, if it’s the LAST thing you do today, just read this:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._AA) | [ CLICK TO READ MARSHA’S MESSAGE >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._8NXNrMarrJuMg)

\- Marsha Blackburn

| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=cfdf10b22a4b45129a4543ff460677ec&_e=Q_jdVyyFpyvEFhxqRM5KqaDSnaLiIl5EiRWUIYLiPkkmpWe5DhZWLDp11yS9gCktg4zeWnfzxzHJUnO5BUsAGY3oDiBcMcGnEvDuyPyS1Ym8GudDmpW9XMlLU-VVtQI1NjTjz7TogT_rh1ihUpBNAHRo_K0NQ2RK2jk6YMjz3c4EH9I23YCI029dP2vVjlR9zqMXOzrT2cyC_1rICEaKYcnqK8gZCrKhIby0bOi-qjJqrhbTVrhQYclYp99xbR9buT7hnDw2cDMnGPmF70T6QBl4fnsCWgOIXzKUvs_O749gO4jHeqXCIMaWRPHdihBOlN59uI810LatU3C6iT23hUmkEugFMl3cmJAaLXAImyJu0ZxxMkTfD1QqGavW_fUwo1kaD-CyIK3R2boVifVHZREs3fnX705wTT_egf-eDewZ_qWA48rsRJD9tJFTLViaGWG_KAmQHUYZnrnHUdtXfS_VTfWpy-kONdfK4geZm1jhSvNV2L8HQRxyU5xXOb-8lq1RqEJHWDN4_aT5PJxIzL8tCOmB1fFNlExiqIIFG_eUnqBtX-fdVsUmJO24AsNMLSnxopeiol7WlLoep3qH9zVnozXapgcgwfKUHPafaasZGRrMeOPFvTD1Bc1g2IcDcgu85ao34pvVz4ii7-GCxRI-BEdtRHOBTFqPhS0_z3G0c0DFdC0LvBgPdax4Gzrk)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Angela Gonzales-Torres
subject: This is a campaign for Angelenos, by Angelenos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela for CA-34
body:
It’s important to me that we do this the right way.
# [](https://act.angela4congress.com/go/60?refcode=em20260119-226&t=1&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)
Angela Gonzales-Torres is a pro-human rights candidate running to represent CA-34. Email is one of the most important ways that we can keep you informed on this critical race, but if you want to stop receiving emails from us, [**click here**](https://act.angela4congress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH).
---
Heyit's Angela and I’m running for Congress in CA-34.
[**If you’re ready to elect a working-class champion with a strong moral backbone who will not only fight back against the Trump administration’s cruelty with the urgency it demands, but take on the Democratic corporate establishment, can you chip in $10 to become a foundational supporter of our campaign today?**](https://act.angela4congress.com/go/128?c0=em_ms_agt_welcome_1.LKrLK5&amount=5&refcode=em20260119-226&t=3&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)
When I was 15, my family was ripped apart when my father was deported, and my sisters and I were raised by our single mother in northeast LA. My roots are in Highland Park, where generations of my working-class family have lived and built community, and where I’m proud to have led the Historic Highland Park Neighborhood Council.
I’ve lived the struggles our community faces — from housing instability to wage stagnation, from family separation to gun violence — and I know what it means to fight for real change.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more today to become a donor to our grassroots campaign for Congress?**](https://act.angela4congress.com/go/128?c0=em_ms_agt_welcome_1.LKrLK5&amount=5&refcode=em20260119-226&t=4&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH) _The amount you give doesn’t matter, but having your support would mean the world to me._
I am proud to have the support of organizations like Justice Democrats and to join their slate of working-class champions. Unlike my opponent, I’m committed to running this campaign the right way: that means not taking any corporate PAC, fossil fuel, or real estate developer money. **I refuse to take a dime from the villains who are making my community suffer.**
I know it’s going to take **_a lot_** to be taken seriously in this race. As a young Chicana woman going up against a career politician backed by AIPAC, I know that we have a long road ahead of us.
But I have an unwavering commitment to lifting up my community and fighting for a better future for the next generation. Los Angeles is my home, and I want to see it thrive.
[**Will you support our campaign with a day one donation of $5 today?**](https://act.angela4congress.com/go/128?c0=em_ms_agt_welcome_1.LKrLK5&amount=5&refcode=em20260119-226&t=5&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)
More soon,
Angela
[](https://act.angela4congress.com/go/128?c0=em_ms_agt_welcome_1.LKrLK5&amount=5&refcode=em20260119-226&t=6&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_agt_footer?refcode=em20260119-226-&t=7&refcode2=226_66908_CurzvH&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)**
---
Email us: [team@angela4congress.com](mailto:info@angela4congress.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.angela4congress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.angela4congress.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.angela4congress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=226%2E66908%2ECurzvH)

Paid for by Angela for CA-34

Not one, but TWO polls now show Sherrod AHEAD in this Senate race! Our momentum is growing by the day, and we’re fired up to flip this seat. 🔥
But now, our opponent and his corporate special interest allies are panicking. They’re gearing up to spend millions to defeat us – and misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves.

name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: Panel - Fixing California Public Education - Friday in Los Gatos
body:
2026 is a big election year for California and fixing our abysmal K-12 public education system is a top priority. We will be electing the State Superintendent of Public Instruction (open seat) this ye | | | [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D696e81946466532bda3e00bd%26ss_email_id%3D696eb97a16287076af1baac2%26ss_campaign_name%3DPanel%2B-%2BFixing%2BCalifornia%2BPublic%2BEducation%2B-%2BFriday%2Bin%2BLos%2BGatos%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2026-01-19T23%253A08%253A49Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=tlXORMO3MK2i0PrencpjC0gUjXw%3D)
---
| | [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cineluxtheatres.com%2Fcinelux-los-gatos-theatre%2Ftickets%2F070694000061&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=GLvIxdxhDb0E6YkusFsYzQFQKLc%3D)
---
2026 is a big election year for California and fixing our abysmal K-12 public education system is a top priority. We will be electing the **State Superintendent of Public Instruction** (open seat) this year and you have an opportunity to meet [**Gus Mattamal**](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.gusforca.com%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=Hf0NJxkUN-SFCTMJhGCmmHv6ubE%3D) who is running for this important position. Gus recently authored ["A is for Average"](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.aisforavg.com%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=F9Vkmx5iENlb_ijLWV1BPEJLwVE%3D), which outlines his bold reform agenda to address our poor outcomes (California is bottom 10 in the country). Moreover, we won't address the growing hatred in our society without addressing the politicization of our classrooms. Please join us this Friday January 23 in Los Gatos for a private screening with [Natalya Murakhver](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Frestorechildhood.com%2Four-team&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=l3D4peWdCNtBM5wsqFGLjMs_sG0%3D), Director of[ "15 Days"](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.15daysfilm.com%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=gYVM3e8w0A5nantMIi_5DP5nxuM%3D), a documentary which exposes how the teacher's unions used COVID to unleash their plan to change society through our schools. All kids are suffering as a result of this agenda so come learn what you can do about it. This evening is generously hosted by [Alex Rampell](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fa16z.com%2Fauthor%2Falex-rampell%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=TfdLqD4aZsLnaH-0AeehSFtZvXU%3D) and the screening will be followed by a panel discussion (including **Palo Alto School Board Vice President - Rowena Chiu**) on how we fix California's public education system. Dr. Diana Blum will be moderating the event.**When** : FRIDAY, JANUARY 23, 2026 • 7:00 PM**Where:** CINELUX LOS GATOS THEATRE - 43 N Santa Cruz Ave, Los Gatos, CA**AGENDA** : $20 [Purchase Tickets Here](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cineluxtheatres.com%2Fcinelux-los-gatos-theatre%2Ftickets%2F070694000061&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=GLvIxdxhDb0E6YkusFsYzQFQKLc%3D)6:30 PM Doors Open
7:00 PM Film Screening
8:15 PM Panel & Q&A
9:15 PM Reception

---
[View blog](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=696eb97a16287076af1baac2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D696e81946466532bda3e00bd%26ss_email_id%3D696eb97a16287076af1baac2%26ss_campaign_name%3DPanel%2B-%2BFixing%2BCalifornia%2BPublic%2BEducation%2B-%2BFriday%2Bin%2BLos%2BGatos%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2026-01-19T23%253A08%253A49Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_696e81946466532bda3e00bd&l=en-US&s=L6Jc1TBCwNUwZtes8ZlfSFldSvQ%3D)

name: Rachel Petri, Team Pappas
subject: There’s no way around this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I have something important to tell you.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)
Hi, it’s Rachel, Chris Pappas’s campaign manager. I’m reaching out with an important update from on the ground in New Hampshire’s Senate race -- **[and I’m going to ask if you can contribute to help our efforts today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260119_2.kt4YPQ&refcode=em20260119-2&t=2&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)**
There’s no way around it: Recent polling has Chris officially _tied_ with our opponent John Sununu. Republicans are eyeing this Senate seat as one of their best pickup opportunities in November. And their super PAC and billionaire allies are ready to go all-in to buy New Hampshire’s Senate seat.
**The only way we’ll be able to compete is with a powerful movement of thousands of grassroots supporters.**
Chris is running a strong, values-driven, pro-democracy campaign with a message that can stand up to GOP attacks. But we can only share our message across New Hampshire if we have the funds to get ads, mailers, and events off the ground.
If there’s one takeaway you get from this email, let it be that **New Hampshire is not a safe blue seat.** We can’t afford to be complacent. We need your help now to elect Chris Pappas.
**[Please, will you do your part in the fight to keep New Hampshire blue by chipping in $5 or whatever you can today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260119_2.kt4YPQ&refcode=em20260119-2&t=3&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260119_2.kt4YPQ&amount=5&refcode=em20260119-2&t=22&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)**
Thanks for reading my updates -- I’m glad you’re on board.
Together,
Rachel Petri
Campaign Manager, Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260119-2&t=23&refcode2=4662_582294_kCGvsO&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4662%2E582294%2EkCGvsO)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Now, we're expanding to dozens of critical states: AZ, GA, NC, MI, PA, WI, NV, and more—contacting voters, chasing mail-ins, and ensuring EVERY vote is counted RIGHT, no scams allowed. November 3, 2026? That's not when it's won. It's months before, in the preparation that out-hustles their fraud machine. Let’s win this thing together. Turning Point PAC | Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. _And I would NEVER not follow through on a promise. _

From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously.

**[I don’t want to have to show up to my meeting empty-handed. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises.

**_I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. _**

When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them.

From when I took an oath to our country as a Marine to my swearing in as Vice President, I take my word seriously. There's a lot of people in the swamp who like to make empty promises. I 'm proud to say that I'm not one of them. When I say something, I mean it. So when I promised my fellow Republicans I'd have your responses ready, I was ready to go to any length to get them. I look forward to reading your responses, JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Kick off the new year with friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Meet a new Forwardist!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=1)
---
|
### First Call of the Year
Please join us Tonight, Monday, January 19th, at 8pm to kick off 2026. Naturally, we'll be kicking it off with our best foot _Forward_. This year will be our biggest year yet, and you can be a part of it! [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6P9-Hx0zs-QPm6VAaSuDh57pCpf-Mjr3dayMC0yHgY87NkM-9BTWMcuhZbqNkiBcA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=2) For last month's call, we did something a little different: We teamed up with Forward Maryland and Forward New Jersey for an end-of-year party. [Check out the recording](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfbfFjDwe2iIVlqbzCj6hYGV&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=3) to hear about our neighbors. This month, we're turning the focus back to Pennsylvania... starting with a special guest!
* * *
### Affiliation Announcement
We are excited to announce the affiliation of Ron Ruman with the Pennsylvania Forward Party. Ron is currently serving as a Township Supervisor and has been a Forward Party supporter for several years. He has a background in journalism and government communications. He's an avid supporter of our friends at Fair Districts PA. Ron intends to join our call Monday night and share what working with the Forward Party means to him. If you know an officeholder or candidate like Ron, please let them (and us) know that they might be a fit for Forward. We're building a movement that's bigger than our party... and it grows when people make connections in their communities. That means talking about Forward with people you know!
##
### Forward Party Regional Calls
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0jMPf0Vsr_JggDGOBK_6CXYKluUFLbjo-WkZy8rM_D_lg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=4) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0j0wHK5mUWhxq1SDENoGfhSKL7-ORVMRnltXvVBA4zRxg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=5)
### Partner Events
Consider attending an event hosted by one of these like-minded organizations. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=9uXvLFWjE5mzuMHyuhN8Z7F22MHJe0CRozGjxShprFUaWUQDPxs2bOqBFPxOZaLjt1uaqC7EZVClwVcgmjCG1aDjHhmkVxJpW1C8WvH1j_4&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=6) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=uFQjvpFVxODhIZ5faZuuouUSVB2Bi17pkf2KSpTHLj1mxSOolJ98zG-mtQVwQlvGACdFkY8LBnd2c-ysMnjBPQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=7) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=m5a44Sa22KYXVYBV41sC5J0w3oF1d64zHC3aGxDf9iN8Z_e50czraeV_ifj19n6JEp_HqXZ9dkkm5lCGSYtqaFDyUIa02S4PArBvbqoXtiSi63T-H8ILRB37N6AFIj1UFsYCpKe7isX0pOaRPCLNNA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=8) [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=m5a44Sa22KYXVYBV41sC5OzGJIJViFB2cLtRDhi-9UiZYlNg03dVEF-IXJuOtUNanhJQfUJL5kLkwFbMq2Q1ctFApOFjPUjd0_otZDGsUgM1ORPrN0GfzmdlKyuU0LLlX__qZWki3Ogs8zmosB_lAsLoHtID5URs4AVTdPeY9bg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=cp9cyIrzkt6DO9OIJonglGm29qVSge2scV-vXTtmpFk6bZHxNkYbTJa1hBD0fg3BihruCyh5M2wC-WnSPJ4neDSY55VXOeGjKVzD5ETYuFnDAmTFg9BG95qQzysrPktLD7FAQCH9EjSE7Ya-D_qKIZGDxOAI3PdGK2U9VYjDmSWuv4-sILAFSsU2y_bUR17b9n_wS3KMsqdlR-jStjtoXQ6ATJ_HJaNzy4ZQc9kh4pFg1st71eevWkZM0Yf9sxmc48-8xOw1YnOvQY0-jC_AEXCbQdD3UvNb2SPJ94gBJ9uUHyjP8JuSYbUGEoI7gD38lKZgOOiMJd_4PeuQ_CbZSzod9QhGJMI6y5jX4XZMZmc&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_us_tonight_jan_2026&n=10) Join the conversation with other PA Forward supporters on Slack!
