clean_body: Meet a new Forwardist! | | | First Call of the Year Please join us Tonight, Monday, January 19th, at 8pm to kick off 2026. Naturally, we'll be kicking it off with our best foot Forward. This year will be our biggest year yet, and you can be a part of it! For last month's call, we did something a little different: We teamed up with Forward Maryland and Forward New Jersey for an end-of-year party. to hear about our neighbors. This month, we're turning the focus back to Pennsylvania... starting with a special guest! * Affiliation Announcement We are excited to announce the affiliation of Ron Ruman with the Pennsylvania Forward Party. Ron is currently serving as a Township Supervisor and has been a Forward Party supporter for several years. He has a background in journalism and government communications. He's an avid supporter of our friends at Fair Districts PA. Ron intends to join our call Monday night and share what working with the Forward Party means to him. If you know an officeholder or candidate like Ron, please let them (and us) know that they might be a fit for Forward. We're building a movement that's bigger than our party... and it grows when people make connections in their communities. That means talking about Forward with people you know! Forward Party Regional Calls Partner Events Consider attending an event hosted by one of these like-minded organizations. Join the conversation with other PA Forward supporters on Slack! It's the best way to start getting involved. Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2026 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: How Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life
body:
Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32c50c7797e840aba286e9ecb92a79dc&_e=KkH2R4ugOkDyyqNZj7gFGdOvFFn7c0AGG7Z_N98o644JE7CcgZC2a4A6hikK06hZSTFXeREtObu5u7XqlEsd4YhBQzUxn2Nu7ex4DmrXfSt6-_lMha1tWO1uSWPRcYIKtGEjMa3-9-nSx8Y_pPWOyjTOOIWP0NiNIsWT8UyDXOHycjx0Z-H_sUuX6lw-hfGLWFmonUa290o1iHy5ld95wIjmWg3Ti1YNdorVNI-NGR7yuC1Zhnaaj0hvBfWL_5Q3OGKelRWlrZ_3OGEAgOuzlCszkchR3HJEgZkrJeEBmt6YEHhZMI-iQYsX07XcJ4gcxlG8JvxbgdqadIAZklsicGvZ4EkJHCNxW5xeJFUUZQtXbOY1935oMaj3vh20jZyIXXQEjYWUO3t3JkDZyAfGRBeUWPD4UNJK3GXQYC_tGEvODK5rVl_JYwbvvWlmYkAbne0uylLK1mU5yo-TkyZS4HKGRMejmR_2zryIt_zZ8Onb-0eVsOE6j6m9MdKp7qeNgtc_rdLXektiRXTvrgAPKMPuyF3zDggBl-zShvbSvvrJpjGqwjoYZKVRrUbU6jGncvYyRXXcb0y8Vc8-cnRx0UDmsBRkk93Tzg2tgFsjccRDbO2cgA09v5JEhfcSJxhjwBNGTAUP5GDT3VtqA8JonnwxXiTp4fkmGWrebdQPnLRAFyLMrGEx6ykFJwJ6q1w7)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32c50c7797e840aba286e9ecb92a79dc&_e=KkH2R4ugOkDyyqNZj7gFGdOvFFn7c0AGG7Z_N98o644JE7CcgZC2a4A6hikK06hZSTFXeREtObu5u7XqlEsd4YhBQzUxn2Nu7ex4DmrXfSt6-_lMha1tWO1uSWPRcYIKtGEjMa3-9-nSx8Y_pPWOyjTOOIWP0NiNIsWT8UyDXOHycjx0Z-H_sUuX6lw-hfGLWFmonUa290o1iHy5ld95wIjmWg3Ti1YNdorVNI-NGR6QeiAPokR6TFm6CfwedzJ3qq-9xGveLVHwJnKGaCYmv-pV5LyuxWeJl2ZTDyQLgBlneQJGnke2S9a_qvKblAL7i1nGdGKIp26pwwpt_-TgLZcy1yP9MVjmwWxyWGPbEXmqnD5QP942B_W4hmLMfzTTW6AAHdwiRK9wX294J7cXmChtjz_jXstWvcHDfRPYnA2NwFO7VUsG_yf7wBZFnqqJLLMZdsG5wTq4z5w5W87fR5nnj_93wy2gJ8wFyzYfPR5wVu9_PbnZl9wtzbmSEGT3ZM3RjrqlvoHoYy0DYPQByeF0q4J0NkNa9lHj98EAeKjNDMXZ_ZdAOF-QUphrmkiY5ABE7n-G86gv21z9udyEQWTASnyAVqBE-cGba_sweW6rrvHSNvkY2UnDND1_u8CUavhGjQzLtGUYarKgLcWA330SubIpyxoIunG8aHukN_90rm3Xsccn-_2KWlj2xaLN)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32c50c7797e840aba286e9ecb92a79dc&_e=KkH2R4ugOkDyyqNZj7gFGdOvFFn7c0AGG7Z_N98o644JE7CcgZC2a4A6hikK06hZSTFXeREtObu5u7XqlEsd4YhBQzUxn2Nu7ex4DmrXfSt6-_lMha1tWO1uSWPRcYIKtGEjMa3-9-nSx8Y_pPWOyjTOOIWP0NiNIsWT8UyDXOHycjx0Z-H_sUuX6lw-hfGLWFmonUa290o1iHy5ld95wIjmWg3Ti1YNdorVNI-NGR67IvgOlFb428blC6J5Dvn31BJBQ1HwWp9WK5FEga3xiwnwbMp-TyIbFypZedAVoEvbT2DDPNfDIuj1gN7isjVa3NWRcqHdP-daAC0crh5T4Rx2VqJjJIuBVpHaCv6gwY7HknQ7M6hOJWaC6tebabWxTr3g7bjrIKiAh2Q9QAvsC3cYA-Ag0YzPSxtifPyRUYSGqu4apAFh-3r59GB9VbMuy5OBxbQImvZUNl0UKQjJY35E4ZQ4fnapZGNUTuTEwArpwuaC21wRJOoSnLJK7pBv64_BhaqGrPTteT3ZSO-qUL04iaypfxjtAd1veQeYBSHDjJm7EYi_KPMI26cYHLvnH1EfJkWojeQxw-7z3It-bL3GTYopJSanT2OExUSTPyqn7fOVvaH0edBuCtpTJSXjYTyOhErizQ85UuJJEeuUEWzqKnrBp-blwOLwr7d--KFrnJ6JmWNkWTHzS4MP6emY)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32c50c7797e840aba286e9ecb92a79dc&_e=KkH2R4ugOkDyyqNZj7gFGdOvFFn7c0AGG7Z_N98o644JE7CcgZC2a4A6hikK06hZSTFXeREtObu5u7XqlEsd4YhBQzUxn2Nu7ex4DmrXfSt6-_lMha1tWO1uSWPRcYIKtGEjMa3-9-nSx8Y_pPWOyjTOOIWP0NiNIsWT8UyDXOHycjx0Z-H_sUuX6lw-hfGLWFmonUa290o1iHy5ld95wIjmWg3Ti1YNdorVNI-NGR6ccLFDcXqKRN60x_HwfLJ0Qzk8bB841XYdcAbhjShDFj4KiyvR-ESVg1E53Mbnzmt8S1Y3gdl0nqrGqwsaa0GnXp5BTNi8R2J0gbdV3_F03vDyq2bE8uLwVJhvfY6FKLBQbvWN5YwDmaF7zMwgAzkNJiIYc7pGaB_24VBE4SyWI6lz2LzLujyCRS4jwHcAPRWjLSGFq9vroAs8gTFNua-3u8Lh_7WCqa95ivXms9aHK0yn-7PSDLdArYpZUAK5sE0ljwcS1pDAGelHEOCqw26NeCbos-v3mRUVRnK4gUyctQ3-KEl_4RG1UlOGrGgM9SuTQLy6KH0dXbE7z6qhpeSp7rW_ZKjAKGvU8OV4HPhMmiBo-B10GSshdjWx2pQcmiMUZomeQtUtnnCOpAN-gdBJTAkznVRFzS1tVkGZxBvm2yRnpmC4clXa-YakHFgM71_cfX3qJSWsVkuP2L8c3jDi)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32c50c7797e840aba286e9ecb92a79dc&_e=KkH2R4ugOkDyyqNZj7gFGdOvFFn7c0AGG7Z_N98o644JE7CcgZC2a4A6hikK06hZSTFXeREtObu5u7XqlEsd4YhBQzUxn2Nu7ex4DmrXfSt6-_lMha1tWO1uSWPRcYIKtGEjMa3-9-nSx8Y_pPWOyjTOOIWP0NiNIsWT8UyDXOHycjx0Z-H_sUuX6lw-hfGLWFmonUa290o1iHy5ld95wIjmWg3Ti1YNdorVNI-NGR4H3-VLYRHDttxBMhyGqVAhwnzV0QmTLSGCqreu6YBpq8mKSfs1S4jn8SOmys1k6fc6JxsWGP-zBGwXWtafV0b8GqejhuY02ddjA-z6678mv9pd39fHV5hFJTM0BGl5D9fmOrtSk57uDHZaCTVGZsXr5b0nwpfl2JWCqhuEwnHswyWW2BIGQpVH_kZcZi0tW7xMfr-D08GbYhRXeWHD55_knOp9O6NS0Z_FpcnoH1cgvkbIZ1PuPaG0oDU1Ra4Cq4moXM_kB0OtcrY5UAjcktkOCKmVNZKPbbUgIh2AzIiXUaoY56qWW66TlzLXTOvfxFa_bAGzuoOKXXIKXVcq-Zhw8BSSZc1W4XbYSWhwAnjmYiWlBWFaP0akWSL5FDeiec7R_chd35P3y1chRGvf-M_Xp27yzNJZymyQ98ElcEzBqdMTtJmlGZCUCGdKrTwIWd2xLwiLa054AtSL1-1a--E3)**

clean_body: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...| | | | | Patriot, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
